  // ── SCHEDULE FORM ──
  var schedServices = {
    anesthesiologist: [
      'Complete Surgical Care Package ($850)',
      'Labor & Delivery Consultation — New Patient ($400)',
      'Labor & Delivery Consultation — Return Patient ($250)',
      'Vitamin Supplementation — Initial Consultation ($250)',
      'Vitamin Supplementation — Follow-Up Reevaluation ($150)'
    ],
    therapist: [
      'Mental Wellness — Single Session ($250)'
    ]
  };


  function updateServices() {
    var consultant = document.getElementById('s1-consultant').value;
    var sel = document.getElementById('s2-service');
    sel.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select service...</option>';
    if (consultant && schedServices[consultant]) {
      schedServices[consultant].forEach(function(s) {
        var opt = document.createElement('option');
        opt.value = s; opt.textContent = s;
        sel.appendChild(opt);
      });
    }
    // Show Mental Wellness add-on only for Dr. Oluwole patients
    var addonWrap = document.getElementById('s2-addon-wrap');
    if (addonWrap) addonWrap.style.display = (consultant === 'anesthesiologist') ? '' : 'none';
    var addonCb = document.getElementById('s2-addon-mh');
    if (addonCb && consultant !== 'anesthesiologist') addonCb.checked = false;
    // Attach service-change listener for upsell
    sel.addEventListener('change', checkUpsell);
  }

  function checkUpsell() {
    var sel = document.getElementById('s2-service');
    var upsell = document.getElementById('s2-upsell-wrap');
    var consultant = document.getElementById('s1-consultant').value;
    // Show mental wellness upsell for the Complete Surgical Care Package only
    if (upsell) upsell.style.display = (sel && sel.value === 'Complete Surgical Care Package ($850)' && consultant === 'anesthesiologist') ? '' : 'none';
  }

  function upgradeToPackage() {
    // Deprecated - pricing simplified to single package
  }

  function schedSetStep(n) {
    ['sched-ind-1','sched-ind-2','sched-ind-3','sched-ind-4'].forEach(function(id, i) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el) return;
      el.classList.remove('active','done');
      if (i + 1 < n) el.classList.add('done');
      else if (i + 1 === n) el.classList.add('active');
    });
    ['sched-step1','sched-step2','sched-step3','sched-step4'].forEach(function(id, i) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (el) el.style.display = (i + 1 === n) ? '' : 'none';
    });
    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
  }

  function schedStep1Next() {
    var fields = ['s1-fname','s1-lname','s1-email','s1-phone','s1-dob','s1-procedure','s1-consultant'];
    var valid = true;
    fields.forEach(function(id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el.value.trim()) { el.classList.add('error'); valid = false; }
      else el.classList.remove('error');
    });
    if (!valid) return;
    // Capture email for abandoned cart recovery
    var cartEmail = document.getElementById('s1-email').value.trim();
    if (cartEmail) {
      fetch('/api/abandoned-cart', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          action: 'capture',
          email: cartEmail,
          fname: document.getElementById('s1-fname').value.trim(),
          lname: document.getElementById('s1-lname').value.trim(),
          service: document.getElementById('s1-consultant').value
        })
      }).catch(function() {});
    }
    updateServices();
    // Fire Lead event when user has completed personal info and is in checkout flow
    if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
      fbq('track', 'Lead', { content_name: 'Booking Form - Step 2' });
    }
    schedSetStep(2);
  }

  var SCHED_PRICES = {
    'Complete Surgical Care Package': 850,
    'Labor & Delivery Consultation — New Patient': 400,
    'Labor & Delivery Consultation — Return Patient': 250,
    'Mental Wellness — Single Session': 250,
    'Mental Wellness — Bundle Add-On': 200,
    'Vitamin Supplementation — Initial Consultation': 250,
    'Vitamin Supplementation — Follow-Up Reevaluation': 150,
  };

  function schedStep2Next() {
    var fields = ['s2-service','s2-date','s2-time'];
    var valid = true;
    fields.forEach(function(id) {
      var el = document.getElementById(id);
      if (!el.value.trim()) { el.classList.add('error'); valid = false; }
      else el.classList.remove('error');
    });
    if (!valid) return;

    var service = document.getElementById('s2-service').value;
    var serviceName = service.replace(/\s*\(\$[\d,]+\)/, '');
    var addOn = document.getElementById('s2-addon-mh') && document.getElementById('s2-addon-mh').checked;
    var fname = document.getElementById('s1-fname').value;
    var lname = document.getElementById('s1-lname').value;
    var date = document.getElementById('s2-date').value;
    var time = document.getElementById('s2-time').value;

    // Build order items
    var items = [{ name: serviceName, price: SCHED_PRICES[serviceName] || 0 }];
    if (addOn) items.push({ name: 'Mental Wellness — Bundle Add-On', price: 200 });

    var total = items.reduce(function(sum, i) { return sum + i.price; }, 0);

    // Render order items
    var itemsHtml = items.map(function(item) {
      return '<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; background:var(--warm-white); border:1px solid var(--border); border-radius:8px; padding:0.65rem 1rem; font-family:\'DM Sans\',sans-serif; font-size:0.88rem; color:var(--charcoal);">' +
        '<span>' + item.name + '</span>' +
        '<span style="font-weight:700; color:var(--gold);">$' + item.price + '</span>' +
        '</div>';
    }).join('');
    document.getElementById('s3-order-items').innerHTML = itemsHtml;
    document.getElementById('s3-total-amount').textContent = '$' + total;
    document.getElementById('s3-appt-detail').innerHTML =
      '<strong>Patient:</strong> ' + fname + ' ' + lname + '<br>' +
      '<strong>Procedure:</strong> ' + document.getElementById('s1-procedure').value + '<br>' +
      '<strong>Preferred:</strong> ' + date + ' at ' + time;

    // Save to sessionStorage for post-payment restore
    sessionStorage.setItem('opwell_booking', JSON.stringify({
      fname: fname, lname: lname,
      email: document.getElementById('s1-email').value,
      procedure: document.getElementById('s1-procedure').value,
      service: service, date: date, time: time,
      items: items.map(function(i) { return i.name; }),
      itemsWithPrice: items,
      total: total,
      feedbackConsent: document.getElementById('s1-feedback-consent').checked
    }));

    schedSetStep(3);
  }

  async function payWithStripe() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('s3-pay-btn');
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Processing...';
    if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
      var saved = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_booking') || '{}');
      fbq('track', 'InitiateCheckout', { content_name: (saved.items || []).join(', '), currency: 'USD' });
    }

    var saved = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_booking') || '{}');
    if (!saved.items || !saved.items.length) {
      alert('No services selected. Please go back and select a service.');
      btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Pay Now →'; return;
    }

    try {
      var res = await fetch('/api/checkout', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          items: saved.items,
          email: saved.email,
          patientName: saved.fname + ' ' + saved.lname
        })
      });
      var data = await res.json();
      if (data.url) {
        window.location.href = data.url;
      } else {
        alert('Payment error: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error. Please try again.'));
        btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Pay Now →';
      }
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Connection error. Please try again.');
      btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Pay Now →';
    }
  }

  function schedGoBack(toStep) { schedSetStep(toStep); }

  // Detect return from Stripe payment
  (function() {
    if (window.location.search.indexOf('paid=1') !== -1) {
      var saved = sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_booking');
      if (saved) {
        try {
          var data = JSON.parse(saved);

          // Fire purchase conversion events to all platforms
          var transactionId = 'opwell_' + new Date().getTime();

          // GA4 Purchase Event
          if (typeof gtag !== 'undefined') {
            gtag('event', 'purchase', {
              transaction_id: transactionId,
              value: data.total || 0,
              currency: 'USD',
              items: (data.itemsWithPrice || []).map(function(item) {
                return { item_name: item.name, price: item.price, quantity: 1 };
              })
            });
          }

          // Meta Pixel Purchase Event
          if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
            fbq('track', 'Purchase', {
              value: data.total || 0,
              currency: 'USD',
              content_name: (data.items || []).join(', '),
              content_type: 'product'
            });
          }

          showPage('schedule');
          document.getElementById('sched-welcome-banner').style.display = 'block';
          document.getElementById('sched-summary').innerHTML =
            '<strong>Name:</strong> ' + data.fname + ' ' + data.lname + '<br>' +
            '<strong>Procedure:</strong> ' + (data.procedure || '') + '<br>' +
            '<strong>Service:</strong> ' + data.service + '<br>' +
            '<strong>Preferred:</strong> ' + data.date + ' at ' + data.time;
          schedSetStep(4);
          // Confirmation email is sent server-side via Stripe webhook (webhook.js)
          // No client-side email trigger needed
          sessionStorage.removeItem('opwell_booking');
          history.replaceState({}, '', window.location.pathname);
        } catch(e) {}
      }
    }
  })();
  // ── END SCHEDULE FORM ──

  // ── BLOG ACCESS CONTROL ──
  // To change the access code: update BLOG_ACCESS_CODE below AND in send-confirmation.js
  const BLOG_ACCESS_CODE = 'OPWELL2026';
  // To toggle a post free/premium: add or remove its ID from this array
  const PREMIUM_POSTS = []; // All blog posts are now free

  let pendingPremiumPost = null;

  function isBlogUnlocked() {
    return sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_blog_access') === 'true';
  }

  function openBlogPost(postId) {
    if (PREMIUM_POSTS.includes(postId) && !isBlogUnlocked()) {
      pendingPremiumPost = postId;
      document.getElementById('blogGate').classList.add('active');
      document.getElementById('blogGateInput').value = '';
      document.getElementById('blogGateError').style.display = 'none';
      setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('blogGateInput').focus(), 100);
    } else {
      showPage(postId);
    }
  }

  function submitBlogCode() {
    const val = document.getElementById('blogGateInput').value.trim().toUpperCase();
    if (val === BLOG_ACCESS_CODE) {
      sessionStorage.setItem('opwell_blog_access', 'true');
      document.getElementById('blogGate').classList.remove('active');
      if (pendingPremiumPost) { showPage(pendingPremiumPost); pendingPremiumPost = null; }
    } else {
      const err = document.getElementById('blogGateError');
      err.style.display = 'block';
      document.getElementById('blogGateInput').focus();
    }
  }

  function closeBlogGate() {
    document.getElementById('blogGate').classList.remove('active');
    pendingPremiumPost = null;
  }

  // Allow Enter key to submit code
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(e) {
    if (e.key === 'Enter' && document.getElementById('blogGate').classList.contains('active')) {
      submitBlogCode();
    }
  });

  // Mark premium cards with badge on page load + inject back-nav bars into all blog pages
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    PREMIUM_POSTS.forEach(function(postId) {
      const card = document.querySelector('[data-post-id="' + postId + '"]');
      if (card) {
        const badge = document.createElement('div');
        badge.className = 'blog-card-premium';
        badge.innerHTML = '🔒 Patient Access';
        const link = card.querySelector('.blog-card-link');
        if (link) {
          link.textContent = 'Unlock Article →';
          card.insertBefore(badge, link);
        }
      }
    });

    applyBlogLimit();

    // Inject "Back to Blog" bar at the bottom of every individual blog page
    document.querySelectorAll('[id^="page-blog-"]').forEach(function(page) {
      if (page.querySelector('.blog-back-bar')) return; // already present

      // Inject Quiz CTA card before the back bar
      var quizCta = document.createElement('div');
      quizCta.className = 'blog-quiz-cta';
      quizCta.innerHTML =
        '<div class="blog-quiz-cta-inner">' +
          '<div class="blog-quiz-cta-badge">Free Assessment</div>' +
          '<h3 class="blog-quiz-cta-title">How ready are you for surgery?</h3>' +
          '<p class="blog-quiz-cta-text">Take our free 2-minute Surgery Readiness Score and find out what steps you can take today to prepare.</p>' +
          '<a href="/surgery-readiness-quiz.html" class="blog-quiz-cta-btn">Take the Quiz &rarr;</a>' +
        '</div>';
      page.appendChild(quizCta);

      var bar = document.createElement('div');
      bar.className = 'blog-back-bar';
      bar.innerHTML =
        '<button class="blog-back-btn" onclick="showPage(\'blog\')">← Back to Blog</button>' +
        '<button class="blog-consult-btn" onclick="showPage(\'schedule\')">Book a Consultation →</button>';
      page.appendChild(bar);
    });
  });

  var BLOG_INITIAL_COUNT = 6;
  function applyBlogLimit() {
    var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.blog-card[data-category]:not([data-hidden="true"])');
    var count = 0;
    cards.forEach(function(card) {
      if (count < BLOG_INITIAL_COUNT) { card.classList.remove('blog-hidden'); } else { card.classList.add('blog-hidden'); }
      count++;
    });
    var btn = document.getElementById('blogShowMore');
    if (btn) btn.style.display = count > BLOG_INITIAL_COUNT ? 'block' : 'none';
  }
  function showMoreBlogCards() {
    document.querySelectorAll('.blog-card.blog-hidden').forEach(function(card) { card.classList.remove('blog-hidden'); });
    var btn = document.getElementById('blogShowMore');
    if (btn) btn.style.display = 'none';
  }
  function filterBlog(category, btn) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.blog-filter-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
    btn.classList.add('active');
    document.querySelectorAll('.blog-card[data-category]').forEach(function(card) {
      if (category === 'all' || card.dataset.category === category) {
        card.removeAttribute('data-hidden');
      } else {
        card.setAttribute('data-hidden', 'true');
      }
    });
    applyBlogLimit();
  }
  // ── END BLOG ACCESS CONTROL ──

  var PAGE_META = {
    'home':            { title: 'OpWell Concierge — Anesthesiologist-Led Perioperative Care', desc: 'Surgery prep support from a board-certified anesthesiologist. Pre-op consultation, post-op recovery care, mental wellness. Reduce complications. Book online now.' },

  function updatePageMeta(pageId) {
    var meta = PAGE_META[pageId] || PAGE_META['home'];
    document.title = meta.title;
    var desc = document.querySelector('meta[name="description"]');
    if (desc) desc.setAttribute('content', meta.desc);
    var ogTitle = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:title"]');
    if (ogTitle) ogTitle.setAttribute('content', meta.title);
    var ogDesc = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]');
    if (ogDesc) ogDesc.setAttribute('content', meta.desc);
    var twitterTitle = document.querySelector('meta[name="twitter:title"]');
    if (twitterTitle) twitterTitle.setAttribute('content', meta.title);
    var twitterDesc = document.querySelector('meta[name="twitter:description"]');
    if (twitterDesc) twitterDesc.setAttribute('content', meta.desc);
    var canonical = document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]');
    var pageUrl = 'https://www.opwellconcierge.com/' + (pageId === 'home' ? '' : pageId);
    if (canonical) canonical.setAttribute('href', pageUrl);
    var ogUrl = document.querySelector('meta[property="og:url"]');
    if (ogUrl) ogUrl.setAttribute('content', pageUrl);

    // Dynamic Article structured data for blog posts
    var existingArticle = document.getElementById('article-jsonld');
    if (existingArticle) existingArticle.remove();
    if (pageId.startsWith('blog-') && meta !== PAGE_META['home']) {
      var articleSchema = {
        "@context": "https://schema.org",
        "@type": "MedicalWebPage",
        "headline": meta.title.split(' | ')[0],
        "description": meta.desc,
        "url": pageUrl,
        "datePublished": "2026-03-01",
        "dateModified": "2026-03-21",
        "author": {
          "@type": "Person",
          "name": "Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD",
          "jobTitle": "Board-Certified Anesthesiologist",
          "url": "https://www.opwellconcierge.com/about"
        },
        "publisher": {
          "@type": "Organization",
          "name": "OpWell Concierge",
          "url": "https://www.opwellconcierge.com"
        },
        "mainEntityOfPage": pageUrl,
        "medicalAudience": {
          "@type": "PatientAudience",
          "audienceType": "Patient"
        }
      };
      var script = document.createElement('script');
      script.type = 'application/ld+json';
      script.id = 'article-jsonld';
      script.textContent = JSON.stringify(articleSchema);
      document.head.appendChild(script);
    }

    // Dynamic BreadcrumbList for non-homepage
    var existingBreadcrumb = document.getElementById('breadcrumb-jsonld');
    if (existingBreadcrumb) existingBreadcrumb.remove();
    if (pageId !== 'home') {
      var pageName = meta.title.split(' | ')[0];
      var breadcrumbSchema = {
        "@context": "https://schema.org",
        "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
        "itemListElement": [
          { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 1, "name": "Home", "item": "https://www.opwellconcierge.com/" },
          { "@type": "ListItem", "position": 2, "name": pageName, "item": pageUrl }
        ]
      };
      var bcScript = document.createElement('script');
      bcScript.type = 'application/ld+json';
      bcScript.id = 'breadcrumb-jsonld';
      bcScript.textContent = JSON.stringify(breadcrumbSchema);
      document.head.appendChild(bcScript);
    }
  }

  function showPage(pageId, skipPush) {
    const current = document.querySelector('.page.active');
    if (current) {
      current.style.opacity = '0';
      setTimeout(() => {
        document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => { p.classList.remove('active'); p.style.opacity = ''; });
        const page = document.getElementById('page-' + pageId);
        if (page) {
          page.classList.add('active');
          window.scrollTo({ top: 0 });
          initFadeIns();
          updatePageMeta(pageId);
        }
      }, 250);
    } else {
      document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
      const page = document.getElementById('page-' + pageId);
      if (page) { page.classList.add('active'); window.scrollTo({ top: 0 }); initFadeIns(); updatePageMeta(pageId); }
    }
    // Meta Pixel — track key page views
    if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') {
      if (pageId === 'products') fbq('track', 'ViewContent', { content_name: 'Products Page' });
      if (pageId === 'pricing') fbq('track', 'ViewContent', { content_name: 'Pricing Page' });
    }
    // Update URL for SEO and shareable links
    if (!skipPush) {
      var path = pageId === 'home' ? '/' : '/' + pageId;
      history.pushState({ page: pageId }, '', path);
    }
  }

  // Handle browser back/forward buttons
  window.addEventListener('popstate', function(e) {
    if (e.state && e.state.page) {
      showPage(e.state.page, true);
    } else {
      var path = window.location.pathname.replace(/^\//, '') || 'home';
      showPage(path, true);
    }
  });

  // On page load, check URL path and show correct page
  (function() {
    var path = window.location.pathname.replace(/^\//, '');
    if (path && path !== '' && document.getElementById('page-' + path)) {
      showPage(path, true);
    }
  })();

  // ── MOBILE NAV ──
  function toggleMobileNav() {
    var nav = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
    var btn = document.querySelector('.hamburger');
    nav.classList.toggle('open');
    btn.classList.toggle('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = nav.classList.contains('open') ? 'hidden' : '';
  }
  function mobileNavTo(pageId) {
    var nav = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
    var btn = document.querySelector('.hamburger');
    nav.classList.remove('open');
    btn.classList.remove('active');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
    showPage(pageId);
  }

  // ── GIFT SERVICE PRE-SELECT ──
  // ── GIFT PURCHASE FLOW ──
  // ── MASTERCLASS PURCHASE ──
  async function purchaseMasterclass() {
    if (typeof fbq !== 'undefined') fbq('track', 'InitiateCheckout', { content_name: 'Surgery Prep Masterclass', value: 99.00, currency: 'USD' });
    try {
      var res = await fetch('/api/checkout', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          items: ['Surgery Prep Masterclass'],
          email: '',
          patientName: 'Masterclass Purchase'
        })
      });
      var data = await res.json();
      if (data.url) { window.location.href = data.url; }
      else { alert('Error: ' + (data.error || 'Please try again.')); }
    } catch(e) { alert('Connection error. Please try again.'); }
  }

  var giftSelectedService = '';

  function giftService(consultant, serviceName) {
    // Extract clean service name (remove price in parentheses)
    giftSelectedService = serviceName.replace(/\s*\(.*\)$/, '');
    document.getElementById('gift-modal-service').textContent = giftSelectedService;
    document.getElementById('gift-modal').style.display = 'flex';
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }

  function closeGiftModal() {
    document.getElementById('gift-modal').style.display = 'none';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  async function submitGiftPurchase() {
    var btn = document.getElementById('gift-submit-btn');
    var gifterName = document.getElementById('gift-gifter-name').value.trim();
    var gifterEmail = document.getElementById('gift-gifter-email').value.trim();
    var gifterPhone = document.getElementById('gift-gifter-phone').value.trim();
    var recipientName = document.getElementById('gift-recipient-name').value.trim();
    var recipientEmail = document.getElementById('gift-recipient-email').value.trim();
    var recipientPhone = document.getElementById('gift-recipient-phone').value.trim();
    var giftMessage = document.getElementById('gift-message').value.trim();

    if (!gifterName || !gifterEmail || !recipientName || !recipientEmail) {
      alert('Please fill in all required fields.');
      return;
    }

    // Save gift data for post-payment
    sessionStorage.setItem('opwell_gift', JSON.stringify({
      service: giftSelectedService,
      gifterName, gifterEmail, gifterPhone,
      recipientName, recipientEmail, recipientPhone,
      giftMessage
    }));

    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = 'Processing...';

    try {
      var res = await fetch('/api/gift-checkout', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          service: giftSelectedService,
          gifterName, gifterEmail, gifterPhone,
          recipientName, recipientEmail, recipientPhone,
          giftMessage
        })
      });
      var data = await res.json();
      if (data.url) {
        window.location.href = data.url;
      } else {
        alert('Payment error: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown error. Please try again.'));
        btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Pay & Send Gift →';
      }
    } catch (err) {
      alert('Connection error. Please try again.');
      btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = 'Pay & Send Gift →';
    }
  }

  // Detect return from gift payment
  (function() {
    if (window.location.search.indexOf('gift_paid=1') !== -1) {
      var saved = sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_gift');
      if (saved) {
        try {
          var data = JSON.parse(saved);
          // Gift confirmation emails are sent server-side via Stripe webhook (webhook.js)
          sessionStorage.removeItem('opwell_gift');
          history.replaceState({}, '', window.location.pathname);
          // Show success
          showPage('pricing');
          setTimeout(function() {
            document.querySelector('#pricing-tabs .tab-btn:nth-child(5)').click();
            setTimeout(function() {
              alert('Gift sent successfully! ' + data.recipientName + ' will receive an email with booking instructions. You will receive a confirmation receipt.');
            }, 300);
          }, 200);
        } catch(e) {}
      }
    }
  })();

  // ── HERO VIDEO (Vimeo background) ──
  // Video loads via iframe with ?background=1&autoplay=1&loop=1&muted=1
  // Fallback gradient shows while video loads

  function toggleFaq(el) {
    const item = el.parentElement;
    const isOpen = item.classList.contains('open');
    document.querySelectorAll('.faq-item').forEach(i => i.classList.remove('open'));
    if (!isOpen) item.classList.add('open');
  }

  function toggleBlogAccordion(el) {
    var acc = el.closest('.blog-accordion');
    var isOpen = acc.classList.contains('open');
    acc.classList.toggle('open');
    if (!isOpen) {
      el.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
    }
  }

  /* ── SCROLL FADE-IN OBSERVER ── */
  function initFadeIns() {
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting) {
          e.target.classList.add('visible');
          observer.unobserve(e.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.12 });

    document.querySelectorAll([
      '.page.active .section-title', '.page.active .section-tag',
      '.page.active .package-card', '.page.active .mh-who-card',
      '.page.active .faq-item', '.page.active .content-2col',
      '.page.active .risk-callout', '.page.active .highlight-box',
      '.page.active .stat-callout', '.page.active .tool-box',
      '.page.active .blog-icon-card', '.page.active .blog-stat-strip',
      '.page.active .blog-timeline-phase', '.page.active .blog-eras-stat',
      '.page.active .blog-fasting-chart', '.page.active .blog-smoke-step',
      '.page.active .blog-illustration-banner',
      /* Blog-11 / Blog-12 / Blog-13 components */
      '.page.active .cs-stat-box', '.page.active .cs-phase',
      '.page.active .cs-card', '.page.active .cs-evidence',
      '.page.active .fj-verdict', '.page.active .fj-myth',
      '.page.active .fj-study', '.page.active .fj-tl-item',
      /* Blood thinner blog-10 components */
      '.page.active .bt-evidence', '.page.active .bt-bridging',
      /* Blog-14/15 components */
      '.page.active .bbl-phase', '.page.active .at-phase', '.page.active .at-stat-box',
      '.page.active .at-box', '.page.active .at-prep-card',
      /* Blog-16/17/18 components */
      '.page.active .rh-phase', '.page.active .rh-stat-box', '.page.active .rh-box',
      '.page.active .ls-phase', '.page.active .ls-stat-box', '.page.active .ls-box',
      '.page.active .ba-phase', '.page.active .ba-stat-box', '.page.active .ba-box',
      '.page.active .ba-alcl', '.page.active .ba-bii',
      /* Blog-19 teaser components */
      '.page.active .t5-card',
      /* Blog-20/21/22/23 components */
      '.page.active .ld-myth', '.page.active .ld-stat-box',
      '.page.active .mt-stat-box', '.page.active .mt-risk',
      '.page.active .ca-stat-box', '.page.active .ca-box', '.page.active .ca-vs-col',
      '.page.active .gl-stat-box', '.page.active .gl-box', '.page.active .gl-tl-item'
    ].join(',')).forEach(el => {
      if (!el.classList.contains('visible')) {
        el.classList.add('fade-in');
        observer.observe(el);
      }
    });

    /* Also catch any elements that already have fade-in class directly in HTML */
    document.querySelectorAll('.page.active .fade-in:not(.visible)').forEach(el => {
      observer.observe(el);
    });

    /* Stagger package cards grid */
    document.querySelectorAll('.page.active .packages-grid, .page.active .mh-who-grid, .page.active .path-cards').forEach(el => {
      el.classList.add('fade-in-group');
      observer.observe(el);
    });
  }

  /* ── STAT COUNTER ANIMATION ── */
  function animateCounters() {
    const counters = document.querySelectorAll('.stat-callout-num, .stat-num, .evidence-stat');
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting && !e.target.dataset.counted) {
          const el = e.target;
          el.dataset.counted = '1';
          const text = el.textContent.trim();
          // Match numbers like "80", "49", "36", "4,113", "Up to 80"
          const match = text.match(/(\d[\d,]*)/);
          if (match) {
            const numStr = match[1].replace(/,/g, '');
            const target = parseInt(numStr);
            const hasComma = match[1].includes(',');
            const prefix = text.substring(0, text.indexOf(match[1]));
            const suffix = text.substring(text.indexOf(match[1]) + match[1].length);
            let startTime = 0;
            const duration = 2000;
            const step = (timestamp) => {
              if (!startTime) startTime = timestamp;
              const progress = Math.min((timestamp - startTime) / duration, 1);
              // Ease out quart — fast start, slow finish
              const eased = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 4);
              let current = Math.floor(eased * target);
              if (hasComma) current = current.toLocaleString();
              el.textContent = prefix + current + suffix;
              if (progress < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
            };
            requestAnimationFrame(step);
          }
          observer.unobserve(el);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.3 });
    counters.forEach(c => observer.observe(c));
  }

  /* ── STAT NUMBER POP ANIMATION ── */
  function animateStatNums() {
    const targets = document.querySelectorAll(
      '.stat-num, .bss-num, .stat-callout-num, .ds-stat-num, ' +
      '.at-stat-num, .rh-stat-num, .ls-stat-num, .ba-stat-num, ' +
      '.ld-stat-num, .mt-stat-num, .ca-stat-num, .gl-stat-num, .nw-stat-num, .bb-stat-num, .br-stat-num, .mm-stat-num, .bs-stat-num'
    );
    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(e => {
        if (e.isIntersecting && !e.target.classList.contains('stat-num-popped')) {
          e.target.classList.add('stat-num-popped');
          observer.unobserve(e.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.3 });
    targets.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));
  }

  /* ── INIT ON LOAD ── */
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    initFadeIns();
    animateCounters();
    animateStatNums();
  });

  function submitContactForm() {
    var fname = document.getElementById('contact-fname');
    var lname = document.getElementById('contact-lname');
    var email = document.getElementById('contact-email');
    var phone = document.getElementById('contact-phone');
    var state = document.getElementById('contact-state');
    var msg = document.getElementById('contact-message');
    var errBox = document.getElementById('contact-error');

    [fname, lname, email, state, msg].forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('error'); });
    errBox.style.display = 'none';

    var missing = [];
    if (!fname.value.trim()) { fname.classList.add('error'); missing.push('First Name'); }
    if (!lname.value.trim()) { lname.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Last Name'); }
    if (!email.value.trim() || !email.value.includes('@')) { email.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Email'); }
    if (!state.value) { state.classList.add('error'); missing.push('State'); }
    if (!msg.value.trim()) { msg.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Message'); }

    if (missing.length > 0) {
      errBox.textContent = 'Please complete the required fields: ' + missing.join(', ');
      errBox.style.display = 'block';
      return;
    }

    var btn = document.querySelector('#contact-form-card .sched-btn-next');
    var origText = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.style.opacity = '0.6';

    fetch('/api/contact', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        fname: fname.value.trim(),
        lname: lname.value.trim(),
        email: email.value.trim(),
        phone: phone.value.trim(),
        state: state.value,
        message: msg.value.trim()
      })
    })
    .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })
    .then(function(data) {
      if (data.success) {
        document.getElementById('contact-form-card').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('contact-success').style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        errBox.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Please try again or call (678) 235-5822.';
        errBox.style.display = 'block';
        btn.textContent = origText;
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.style.opacity = '1';
      }
    })
    .catch(function() {
      errBox.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Please try again or call (678) 235-5822.';
      errBox.style.display = 'block';
      btn.textContent = origText;
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.style.opacity = '1';
    });
  }

  /* ── Provider Referral / Partnership ── */
  function switchProviderTab(tab) {
    var refBtn = document.getElementById('prov-tab-referral');
    var partBtn = document.getElementById('prov-tab-partnership');
    var refForm = document.getElementById('prov-form-referral');
    var partForm = document.getElementById('prov-form-partnership');
    document.getElementById('prov-success').style.display = 'none';

    if (tab === 'referral') {
      refBtn.style.background = 'var(--sage)'; refBtn.style.color = '#fff';
      partBtn.style.background = 'transparent'; partBtn.style.color = 'var(--sage)';
      refForm.style.display = 'block'; partForm.style.display = 'none';
    } else {
      partBtn.style.background = 'var(--sage)'; partBtn.style.color = '#fff';
      refBtn.style.background = 'transparent'; refBtn.style.color = 'var(--sage)';
      partForm.style.display = 'block'; refForm.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }

  function resetProviderForm() {
    document.getElementById('prov-success').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('prov-form-referral').style.display = 'block';
    switchProviderTab('referral');
    // Clear all inputs
    var page = document.getElementById('page-provider');
    page.querySelectorAll('input, textarea, select').forEach(function(el) {
      if (el.tagName === 'SELECT') { el.selectedIndex = 0; }
      else { el.value = ''; }
      el.classList.remove('error');
    });
  }

  function submitProviderForm(type) {
    var errBox, payload, btn;

    if (type === 'referral') {
      errBox = document.getElementById('prov-ref-error');
      var provName = document.getElementById('prov-ref-name');
      var provPractice = document.getElementById('prov-ref-practice');
      var provEmail = document.getElementById('prov-ref-email');
      var provPhone = document.getElementById('prov-ref-phone');
      var ptName = document.getElementById('prov-ref-ptname');
      var ptEmail = document.getElementById('prov-ref-ptemail');
      var ptPhone = document.getElementById('prov-ref-ptphone');
      var svc = document.getElementById('prov-ref-service');
      var procedure = document.getElementById('prov-ref-procedure');
      var notes = document.getElementById('prov-ref-notes');

      [provName, provPractice, provEmail, ptName, ptEmail, svc].forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('error'); });
      errBox.style.display = 'none';

      var missing = [];
      if (!provName.value.trim()) { provName.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Your Name'); }
      if (!provPractice.value.trim()) { provPractice.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Practice'); }
      if (!provEmail.value.trim() || !provEmail.value.includes('@')) { provEmail.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Your Email'); }
      if (!ptName.value.trim()) { ptName.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Patient Name'); }
      if (!ptEmail.value.trim() || !ptEmail.value.includes('@')) { ptEmail.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Patient Email'); }
      if (!svc.value) { svc.classList.add('error'); missing.push('Service'); }

      if (missing.length > 0) {
        errBox.textContent = 'Please complete: ' + missing.join(', ');
        errBox.style.display = 'block';
        return;
      }

      btn = document.querySelector('#prov-form-referral .sched-btn-next');
      payload = {
        type: 'referral',
        providerName: provName.value.trim(),
        practice: provPractice.value.trim(),
        providerEmail: provEmail.value.trim(),
        providerPhone: provPhone.value.trim(),
        patientName: ptName.value.trim(),
        patientEmail: ptEmail.value.trim(),
        patientPhone: ptPhone.value.trim(),
        service: svc.value,
        procedure: procedure.value.trim(),
        notes: notes.value.trim()
      };
    } else {
      errBox = document.getElementById('prov-part-error');
      var partName = document.getElementById('prov-part-name');
      var partTitle = document.getElementById('prov-part-title');
      var partPractice = document.getElementById('prov-part-practice');
      var partEmail = document.getElementById('prov-part-email');
      var partPhone = document.getElementById('prov-part-phone');
      var partState = document.getElementById('prov-part-state');
      var partSpec = document.getElementById('prov-part-specialty');
      var partMsg = document.getElementById('prov-part-message');

      [partName, partTitle, partPractice, partEmail, partState, partSpec, partMsg].forEach(function(el) { el.classList.remove('error'); });
      errBox.style.display = 'none';

      var missing2 = [];
      if (!partName.value.trim()) { partName.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Name'); }
      if (!partTitle.value.trim()) { partTitle.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Title'); }
      if (!partPractice.value.trim()) { partPractice.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Practice'); }
      if (!partEmail.value.trim() || !partEmail.value.includes('@')) { partEmail.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Email'); }
      if (!partState.value) { partState.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('State'); }
      if (!partSpec.value) { partSpec.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Specialty'); }
      if (!partMsg.value.trim()) { partMsg.classList.add('error'); missing2.push('Message'); }

      if (missing2.length > 0) {
        errBox.textContent = 'Please complete: ' + missing2.join(', ');
        errBox.style.display = 'block';
        return;
      }

      btn = document.querySelector('#prov-form-partnership .sched-btn-next');
      payload = {
        type: 'partnership',
        providerName: partName.value.trim(),
        title: partTitle.value.trim(),
        practice: partPractice.value.trim(),
        providerEmail: partEmail.value.trim(),
        providerPhone: partPhone.value.trim(),
        state: partState.value,
        specialty: partSpec.value,
        message: partMsg.value.trim()
      };
    }

    var origText = btn.textContent;
    btn.textContent = 'Sending...';
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.style.opacity = '0.6';

    fetch('/api/provider-referral', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      body: JSON.stringify(payload)
    })
    .then(function(res) { return res.json(); })
    .then(function(data) {
      if (data.success) {
        document.getElementById('prov-form-referral').style.display = 'none';
        document.getElementById('prov-form-partnership').style.display = 'none';
        var successDiv = document.getElementById('prov-success');
        if (type === 'referral') {
          document.getElementById('prov-success-title').textContent = 'Referral Submitted';
          document.getElementById('prov-success-msg').textContent = 'Thank you for the referral. We will reach out to your patient within 1-2 business days to schedule their consultation.';
        } else {
          document.getElementById('prov-success-title').textContent = 'Inquiry Submitted';
          document.getElementById('prov-success-msg').textContent = 'Thank you for your interest in partnering with OpWell. We will be in touch within 1-2 business days to discuss next steps.';
        }
        successDiv.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        errBox.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Please try again or call (678) 235-5822.';
        errBox.style.display = 'block';
        btn.textContent = origText;
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.style.opacity = '1';
      }
    })
    .catch(function() {
      errBox.textContent = 'Something went wrong. Please try again or call (678) 235-5822.';
      errBox.style.display = 'block';
      btn.textContent = origText;
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.style.opacity = '1';
    });
  }

</script>

      <!-- 2 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">2. How We Use Your Information</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">We use the information we collect to:</p>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 1rem 1.5rem; padding:0;">

Each email or text message will include instructions on how to opt out. You may unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time by:</p>

      </ul>

      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">We do <strong>not</strong> sell your personal information to third parties.</p>

      <!-- 3 -->

This includes:</p>

        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Implementing reasonable administrative, physical, and technical safeguards</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">For questions about your rights under HIPAA or to request a copy of our Notice of Privacy Practices, contact us at <a href="mailto:dr.oluwole@opwellconcierge.com" style="color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;">dr.oluwole@opwellconcierge.com</a>.</p>

        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;"><strong>Safety:</strong> When disclosure is necessary to protect the rights, property, or safety of our patients or others.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;"><strong>Business Transfers:</strong> In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.</li>
      </ul>

Medical and health-related records are retained in accordance with applicable state and federal requirements, which may vary by jurisdiction (Georgia, Ohio, and Virginia).</p>

      <p style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">Depending on your state of residence, you may have the right to:</p>

        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">File a complaint or exercise any of these rights by contacting OpWell Concierge directly</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">To exercise any of these rights or file a complaint, please contact us via email at <a href="mailto:contact@opwellconcierge.com" style="color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;">contact@opwellconcierge.com</a>.</p>

      <!-- 8 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">8. Security</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">We implement commercially reasonable administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, no method of transmission over the internet or electronic storage is 100% secure. We cannot guarantee absolute security. If you have concerns or believe that there has been a security breach, please contact us immediately at <a href="mailto:contact@opwellconcierge.com" style="color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;">contact@opwellconcierge.com</a>.</p>

      <!-- 9 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">9. Changes to This Policy</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will revise the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. Continued use of our website or services after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated policy.</p>

      <!-- 10 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">10. Third-Party Links</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Our website may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., Charm Health, Stripe, external resources). We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites and encourage you to review their respective privacy policies.</p>

      <!-- 11 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">11. Children's Privacy</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">If you are under the age of eighteen (18), you are not permitted to use this website or services without the consent and supervision of a legal guardian. If you believe a child has accessed our website without proper authorization, please contact us immediately at <a href="mailto:contact@opwellconcierge.com" style="color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;">contact@opwellconcierge.com</a> so we can address the matter.</p>

      <!-- 12 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">12. Contact Us</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;">If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:</p>
      <div style="background:rgba(45,90,61,0.05); border-left:3px solid var(--terracotta); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0; padding:1rem 1.25rem; margin:1rem 0 2rem;">
        <p style="margin:0 0 0.3rem;"><strong>OpWell Concierge</strong></p>
        <p style="margin:0 0 0.3rem;">Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD</p>
        <p style="margin:0 0 0.3rem;">Email: <a href="mailto:dr.oluwole@opwellconcierge.com" style="color:var(--sage); text-decoration:none;">dr.oluwole@opwellconcierge.com</a></p>
        <p style="margin:0;">Phone: (678) 235-5822</p>
      </div>

By accessing or using our site at <strong>opwellconcierge.com</strong> or booking any consultation, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree, do not use our services.</p>

      <!-- 1 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">1. About OpWell Concierge</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">OpWell Concierge is a telehealth concierge practice operated by Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD, a board-certified anesthesiologist. OpWell provides perioperative education, anesthesia risk consultation, post-operative support, labor and delivery preparation, medical tourism pre-travel clearance, and related wellness services via telehealth.</p>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">Mental wellness services are provided by Stacey J. Floyd, MA, LPC, an independently licensed professional counselor licensed in South Carolina and Georgia, operating within the OpWell Concierge platform.</p>

      <!-- 2 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">2. Not an Emergency Service</h2>
      <div style="background:#fff3f0; border-left:3px solid var(--terracotta); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0; padding:1rem 1.25rem; margin:0 0 1rem;">
        <p style="margin:0; font-weight:500;">OpWell Concierge is NOT an emergency medical service. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room immediately. OpWell does not provide urgent or emergency care.</p>
      </div>

      <!-- 3 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">3. Telehealth Services &amp; Scope of Care</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">OpWell Concierge provides <strong>professional medical consultations</strong> delivered by licensed healthcare providers. Our consultative services are supported by evidence-based guidance and educational resources designed to support your health and wellness. Specifically:</p>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 1rem 1.5rem; padding:0;">
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;"><strong>Medical Consultations:</strong> OpWell provides legitimate medical consultative services, including health history review, risk assessment, clinical recommendations, and prescription of non-narcotic medications when clinically appropriate. OpWell does <strong>not</strong> prescribe controlled substances (narcotics) or serve as your primary care physician. Diagnostic tests and laboratory work may be ordered when clinically indicated.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;"><strong>Collaborative Care Model:</strong> OpWell does <strong>not</strong> replace your surgeon, anesthesiologist, OB-GYN, or primary care physician. OpWell services are designed to work <strong>alongside</strong> your existing medical team. You are responsible for discussing all OpWell recommendations and health plan changes with your treating physicians to ensure comprehensive, coordinated care.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;"><strong>Implementation of Recommendations:</strong> All health recommendations and treatment plans provided by OpWell should be reviewed and discussed with your existing medical providers before implementation to ensure alignment with your overall health care strategy.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">A formal patient-physician relationship is not established until a consultation is completed and both parties have agreed to proceed.</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">OpWell is currently licensed to provide telehealth services in Georgia, Ohio, and Virginia. You must be physically located in one of these states at the time of your consultation.</p>

      <!-- 4 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">4. Eligibility</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">You must be at least 18 years of age to book or use OpWell services. By booking a consultation, you represent that you are at least 18 years old and have the legal authority to enter into this agreement.</p>

      <!-- 5 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">5. Booking, Payments &amp; Cancellations</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;"><strong>Booking:</strong> Consultations are scheduled through our online booking platform after payment is completed. Payment confirms your appointment slot.</p>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;"><strong>Payment:</strong> All fees are charged in U.S. dollars and processed securely through Stripe. Fees are non-refundable unless otherwise stated below.</p>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.5rem;"><strong>Cancellations &amp; Rescheduling:</strong></p>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 1rem 1.5rem; padding:0;">
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Cancellations made <strong>72 hours or more</strong> before the date and time of your scheduled appointment are eligible for a <strong>full refund</strong> to your original payment method.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Cancellations made <strong>less than 72 hours</strong> before your scheduled appointment are non-refundable and non-transferable.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">No-shows forfeit the full consultation fee.</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">If OpWell needs to cancel or reschedule your appointment, you will receive a full credit or refund at your option.</li>
      </ul>

      <!-- 6 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">6. Patient Responsibilities</h2>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">By booking a consultation, you agree to:</p>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 1rem 1.5rem; padding:0;">
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Provide accurate and complete health history information</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Attend your scheduled appointment on time via the provided telehealth link</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Use OpWell's medical recommendations and professional guidance as a complement to, not a replacement for, your in-person medical care</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Inform your treating physician of any recommendations received through OpWell</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">Not record, share, or distribute your consultation without prior written consent from OpWell</li>
      </ul>

      <!-- 7 -->
      <h2 style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif; font-size:1.25rem; font-weight:500; color:var(--charcoal); margin:2rem 0 0.75rem; padding-top:1.5rem; border-top:1px solid rgba(45,90,61,0.1);">7. Mental Health Crisis Protocol</h2>
      <div style="background:#fff3f0; border-left:3px solid var(--terracotta); border-radius:0 6px 6px 0; padding:1rem 1.25rem; margin:0 0 1rem;">
        <p style="margin:0; font-weight:500;">If you are in immediate danger or experiencing a psychiatric emergency, call 911 or go to your nearest emergency room. You may also contact the 988 Suicide &amp; Crisis Lifeline by calling or texting 988.</p>
      </div>
      <p style="margin-bottom:0.75rem;">OpWell's mental wellness services are not a substitute for emergency psychiatric care. If, during a session with Stacey J. Floyd, MA, LPC, you express suicidal ideation, intent to harm yourself or others, or present an imminent safety concern:</p>
      <ul style="margin:0 0 1rem 1.5rem; padding:0;">
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">The provider may pause the session to conduct a safety assessment</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">The provider may contact emergency services, a designated emergency contact, or a crisis intervention team on your behalf</li>
        <li style="margin-bottom:0.4rem;">The provider is required to follow mandated reporting obligations under applicable state law (Georgia and South Carolina)</li>
      </ul>
      <p style="margin-bottom:1rem;">By booking a mental wellness session, you acknowledge and consent to these safety interventions.</p>

<script>
(function() {
  // Exit-intent: desktop only, once per session
  if (window.innerWidth < 900) return; // skip mobile/tablet
  if (sessionStorage.getItem('opwell_exit_shown')) return;

  var triggered = false;

  document.addEventListener('mouseout', function(e) {
    if (triggered) return;
    // Only trigger when mouse leaves toward the top of the viewport
    if (e.clientY > 10) return;
    if (e.relatedTarget || e.toElement) return;

    triggered = true;
    sessionStorage.setItem('opwell_exit_shown', 'true');
    document.getElementById('exitPopup').classList.add('active');
  });

  // Close on overlay click (outside the card)
  document.getElementById('exitPopup').addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    if (e.target === this) dismissExitPopup();
  });
})();

function dismissExitPopup() {
  document.getElementById('exitPopup').classList.remove('active');
}
</script>

<!-- Sticky Mobile CTA -->

  <span>Ready to prepare for surgery?</span>
  <button onclick="showPage('schedule')">Book Now →</button>
</div>

</body>
</html>

                title: "Module 1: Anatomy, Landmark Pitfalls & The Vascular Highway",
                content: `In advanced vascular access, we treat the upper extremity venous network like a highly predictable highway map. When dealing with difficult-access (DIVA) patients, clinicians frequently encounter limbs that look completely devoid of surface options. Superficial structures are often scarred, thrombosed (clotted), or sclerosed (hardened) from previous access lines—what we clinically call "cooked spaghetti." Your fingers must be trained to look past visual cues and rely entirely on deeper tissue resilience.

When palpating blindly, a healthy, patent vein acts like an underinflated bicycle tire. When you press into it, it yields easily to finger pressure but exhibits a distinct, elastic "bounce" as blood refills the space. In contrast, a tendon feels like a rigid, tightly wound guitar string with absolutely zero give, while a sclerosed or clotted vein feels completely solid and chord-like.

The primary mistake clinicians make during a blind stick is letting the vessel roll out of the way of the needle bevel. To prevent this, you must master the <strong>Taut Rubber Band anchoring technique</strong>. Take your non-dominant thumb, place it exactly 2 inches distal (below) your intended needle insertion site, and pull the skin firmly down toward the patient's hand. This acts as an anatomical anchor, pulling the vein taut and flattening the rolling tissue. While holding this traction, insert your peripheral intravenous catheter (PIVC) at a 15-to-30-degree angle depending on your depth estimation. Once you see a flash of blood in the chamber, lower your angle flat against the skin, advance the entire needle-and-catheter unit 1–2 millimeters further to ensure the catheter tip (and not just the needle bevel) is fully inside the vein lumen, and smoothly thread the catheter off the needle.`,

                content: `To maximize catheter survival and prevent premature failure, we rely on precise geometric formulas derived from recent vascular access data. According to landmark data from Fields et al. (2012) and Pandurangadu et al. (2018), the optimal target vessel depth (known as the "Goldilocks Zone") for a standard 4.5–4.8 cm catheter is strictly between 0.5 cm and 1.0 cm below the skin surface.

If a vein is deeper than 1.2 cm, standard catheters fail rapidly because an insufficient amount of the catheter material resides inside the actual vein. The math is clear: <strong>0% of PIVCs fail when ≥ 65% of the catheter length resides completely within the vein lumen</strong>. If less than 30% of the catheter is intraluminal, the failure rate spikes to 100% due to normal arm movement pulling the line out. Simple Pythagorean geometry dictates that a vein at a 1.0 cm depth attacked at a standard 45° angle requires a minimum catheter length of ~4.0 cm just to cross the tissue barrier and achieve safety. For any target deeper than 1.0 cm, you must abandon standard lines and upsize to a 6–20 cm midline catheter.

Additionally, your target vessel's inner diameter must be at least 3 mm (ASE 2025). We measure this using the <strong>Catheter-to-Vein Ratio (CVR)</strong>. Data from van Loon et al. (2021) and Fabiani et al. (2023) demonstrates that first-attempt success sits at 92% when the CVR is kept less than 0.40 (meaning your catheter occupies less than 40% of the internal vein space). If the CVR exceeds 45% at the tip level, the risk of catheter failure and thrombosis increases by a hazard ratio of 6.76. You must choose your catheter gauge to match the physical width of the vessel.`,

                id: 3,
                title: "Module 3: Ultrasound Physics, Knobology & The \"Squish Test\"",
                content: `Think of your high-frequency linear probe not as an intimidating physics computer, but simply as a sound-based flashlight. High-frequency sound waves travel through the arm and reflect back when they hit dense, solid tissues like muscle, fascia, or bone. These dense structures show up on your monitor as varying shades of gray or bright white (hyperechoic). However, sound waves pass cleanly through fluids without bouncing back at all. Because blood absorbs the ultrasound energy completely, fluid-filled channels appear on your screen as perfect, pitch-black (anechoic) circles.

To acquire an actionable image, you must master basic knobology (adjusting depth, gain, and frequency select). If your image is too dark to resolve tissue borders, increase the gain (the overall signal amplification). If your target vein is centered at 0.8 cm, minimize your display depth to 1.5–2.0 cm so the target fills the screen, optimizing your spatial resolution.

When you look at the screen and see a black circle, the ASE 2025 guidelines mandate a systematic framework to rule out arteries and nerves. The single most reliable bedside maneuver is the <strong>Squish Test (Dynamic Compression)</strong>. Holding your probe with a light pen-grasp, apply gentle downward pressure directly over the structure. Because veins are thin-walled, contain internal valves, and handle low-pressure flow, a healthy vein will completely compress flat, its walls meeting until it vanishes from your screen.

An artery, however, is built like a heavy-duty, high-pressure water main with a thick, muscular wall. Under probe compression, an artery will refuse to flatten out; it will maintain its round shape, and you will actually watch it actively throb and pulsate against your pressure. If your 2D imaging is equivocal, turn on Color Flow Doppler: arteries will display a rapid, pulsing systolic flow pattern, while veins will show a low-velocity, continuous, uniform laminar color flow.

Additionally, you must scan for <strong>Nerves</strong>. Nerves do not have fluid channels, so they do not look black. Instead, they appear on B-mode ultrasound as distinct round or oval structures with a characteristic honeycomb fascicular pattern—a bright white (hyperechoic) outer ring surrounding tiny dark circles. Nerves are completely non-compressible, non-pulsatile, and show zero Doppler signal. In the upper arm, the deep brachial vein runs directly adjacent to the median nerve and brachial artery. For this exact reason, the ASE 2025 guidelines note that the brachial vein is your absolute last choice for cannulation to minimize accidental nerve and arterial injury.`,

This appearance is completely distinct from veins (anechoic/black), arteries (pulsating round structures), and is non-compressible, non-pulsatile with zero Doppler signal." },

Needle advancement intended for the vein can easily penetrate the artery or nerve, causing serious vascular or neurological injury. ASE 2025 recommends this as an absolute last-resort site only after exhausting all other upper extremity options." },
                            { text: "It lacks internal valves, making catheter threading impossible", correct: false }

            {
                id: 4,
                title: "Module 4: Advanced Tracking Mechanics (SA-OOP Tracking & DNTP)",
                content: `The ASE 2025 guidelines recommend the <strong>Short-Axis Out-of-Plane (SA-OOP)</strong> approach as your primary technique for peripheral venous cannulation. Because peripheral vessels are often tortuous, small, and winding, maintaining them inside a narrow longitudinal view is technically demanding. However, the biggest point of failure in SA-OOP is an optical illusion: losing track of your true needle tip. The ultrasound beam is incredibly thin—like a single sheet of paper cutting through space. Because of this, the shaft of the needle and the very tip of the needle look identical on screen; they both appear as a tiny, bright white, echogenic dot. If you look at the shaft on screen while the tip is actually 5 millimeters deeper, you will inadvertently push the needle straight through the back wall of the vein. Phantom data shows a 15% posterior wall puncture rate when tracking blindly.

To eliminate this risk, you will master <strong>Dynamic Needle Tip Positioning (DNTP)</strong>, which we call the Spotlight & Moving Car method. Clinical trials prove that DNTP increases your relative risk of first-attempt success by 1.43x compared to standard out-of-plane tracking without DNTP.

To execute DNTP:
1. Enter the skin at a 30-to-45-degree angle with your probe face tilted slightly back toward you to maximize the reflection beam. Advance until you see a bright white dot pierce your ultrasound screen. This is your needle entering the spotlight.
2. Immediately slide your ultrasound probe forward (away from you) by 1 to 2 millimeters. The white dot on screen will completely disappear. Your spotlight is now looking at empty tissue just ahead of the needle tip.
3. Now, advance your needle forward by 1 to 2 millimeters until the bright white dot pops back into view on your screen. The needle tip has caught up to the image plane.
4. Repeat this precise cycle: Move the probe, lose the dot, advance the needle, find the dot. Never advance your needle unless you have just scouted the path ahead!`,
                quizzes: [
                    {
                        question: "Why is the needle shaft easily mistaken for the true needle tip when utilizing a standard Short-Axis Out-of-Plane approach?",
