<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<script>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   STATE
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const state = {
  painRest: null, painActivity: null, painLocation: '', painManaged: null, painMeds: null,
  painRestTouched: false, painActivityTouched: false,
  hr: null, sbp: null, dbp: null, temp: null, rr: null, spo2: null,
  drainage: null, opening: null, redness: null, warmth: null, odor: null, swelling: null, woundNotes: '',
  bm: null, lastBM: '', nausea: null, vomiting: null, intake: null, flatus: null,
  ambulation: null, adl: null, actlevel: null, dvt: null,
  anxiety: null, sleep: null, mood: null, fear: null, support: null,
  flags: [false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false],
  surgeryFlags: {bbl:[false,false,false], bariatric:[false,false,false], cesarean:[false,false,false]}
};

const FLAG_LABELS = [
  'Wound drainage, opening, or increasing redness',
  'No bowel movement for more than 24 hours',
  'Increasing or worsening abdominal pain',
  'Vomiting',
  'Abdominal swelling or bloating',
  'High ostomy output and/or dark or no urine output',
  'Fever greater than 101.5°F',
  'Unable to take anything by mouth for more than 24 hours',
  'Shortness of breath or difficulty breathing',
  'Chest pain',
  'Unilateral leg swelling or calf pain',
  'New confusion or altered mental status'
];

const SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS = {
  bbl: ['Unilateral leg swelling or calf pain (DVT/PE risk)','Buttock pain with tachycardia — possible fat embolism','Asymmetric swelling or hardening at surgical site'],
  bariatric: ['Left shoulder pain with tachycardia — possible anastomotic leak','Dumping syndrome','Blood sugar instability'],
  cesarean: ['Heavy lochia (soaking >1 pad/hour)','PPD screen — disconnection, intrusive thoughts, inability to sleep','Foul-smelling vaginal discharge']
};

const SURGERY_INTENSITY = {
  'major-abdominal':'intensive','bariatric':'intensive','cancer':'intensive','thoracic':'intensive','vascular':'intensive',
  'cosmetic-bbl':'enhanced','cosmetic-tummy':'enhanced','cosmetic-other':'enhanced','joint-replacement':'enhanced','hysterectomy':'enhanced','cesarean':'enhanced','moderate-other':'enhanced',
  'laparoscopic':'standard','outpatient':'standard','low-risk-other':'standard'
};

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   TAB NAVIGATION
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function switchTab(tabId) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.panel').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  const panel = document.getElementById('panel-' + tabId);
  if (panel) panel.classList.add('active');
  const btn = document.querySelector('[data-tab="'+tabId+'"]');
  if (btn) btn.classList.add('active');
  if (tabId === 'summary') renderSummary();
}

function toggleAbbreviated() {
  const abbr = document.getElementById('abbreviatedMode').checked;
  const hideTabs = ['gi','functional','mental'];
  hideTabs.forEach(t => {
    const btn = document.querySelector('[data-tab="'+t+'"]');
    if (btn) btn.style.display = abbr ? 'none' : 'flex';
  });
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   POD & INTENSITY
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function updatePOD() {
  const dateStr = document.getElementById('surgeryDate').value;
  if (!dateStr) { document.getElementById('podNum').textContent = '—'; return; }
  const surgDate = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
  const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
  const diff = Math.floor((today - surgDate) / 86400000);
  document.getElementById('podNum').textContent = diff >= 0 ? diff : '—';
  // Auto-suggest abbreviated mode for POD 4+
  if (diff >= 4) {
    document.getElementById('abbreviatedMode').checked = true;
    toggleAbbreviated();
  }
}

function updateIntensity() {
  const sel = document.getElementById('surgeryType').value;
  const badge = document.getElementById('intensityBadge');
  const level = SURGERY_INTENSITY[sel];
  if (!level) { badge.style.display = 'none'; return; }
  badge.style.display = 'inline-flex';
  badge.className = 'intensity-badge intensity-' + level;
  badge.textContent = level.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + level.slice(1) + ' Monitoring';
  // Show/hide surgery-specific flags
  updateSurgerySpecificFlags(sel);
}

function updateSurgerySpecificFlags(surgeryType) {
  const container = document.getElementById('surgerySpecificFlags');
  // Hide all surgery-specific flags first
  document.querySelectorAll('[id^="flag-bbl-"],[id^="flag-bar-"],[id^="flag-cs-"]').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
  // Show relevant ones
  const flagMap = {'cosmetic-bbl':'bbl','bariatric':'bariatric','cesarean':'cesarean'};
  const key = flagMap[surgeryType];
  if (key) {
    container.style.display = 'block';
    const prefix = {bbl:'bbl',bariatric:'bar',cesarean:'cs'}[key];
    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      const el = document.getElementById('flag-' + prefix + '-' + i);
      if (el) el.style.display = 'flex';
    }
  } else {
    container.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   INPUT HANDLERS
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function handleSlider(id, val) {
  val = parseInt(val);
  state[id] = val;
  state[id + 'Touched'] = true;
  const el = document.getElementById(id + 'Val');
  el.textContent = val;
  el.className = 'slider-val ' + (val <= 3 ? 'green' : val <= 6 ? 'yellow' : 'red');
  const qg = el.closest('.q-group');
  qg.className = 'q-group' + (val <= 3 ? ' alert-green' : val <= 6 ? ' alert-yellow' : ' alert-red');
  // Activate slider appearance
  const slider = document.getElementById(id);
  slider.style.opacity = '1';
  // Hide hint
  const hint = document.getElementById(id + 'Hint');
  if (hint) hint.style.display = 'none';
  updateDomainScore('pain');
}

function handleRadio(name, val) {
  state[name] = val;
  // Visual feedback on radio options
  const rg = document.getElementById('rg-' + name);
  if (rg) {
    rg.querySelectorAll('.radio-opt').forEach(o => {
      o.classList.remove('selected','selected-yellow','selected-red');
    });
    const checked = rg.querySelector('input[value="'+val+'"]');
    if (checked) {
      const opt = checked.closest('.radio-opt');
      opt.classList.add('selected');
    }
  }
  // Determine which domain to update
  if (['painManaged','painMeds'].includes(name)) updateDomainScore('pain');
  else if (['drainage','opening','redness','warmth','odor','swelling'].includes(name)) updateDomainScore('wound');
  else if (['bm','nausea','vomiting','intake','flatus'].includes(name)) { autoDetectFlags(); updateDomainScore('gi'); }
  else if (['ambulation','adl','actlevel','dvt'].includes(name)) updateDomainScore('functional');
  else if (['anxiety','sleep','mood','fear','support'].includes(name)) updateDomainScore('mental');
}

function handleVital(field, val) {
  val = val === '' ? null : parseFloat(val);
  state[field] = val;
  const inp = document.getElementById('vital' + field.toUpperCase().replace('SPO2','SpO2').replace('SBP','SBP').replace('DBP','DBP'));
  const inputEl = {hr:'vitalHR',sbp:'vitalSBP',dbp:'vitalDBP',temp:'vitalTemp',rr:'vitalRR',spo2:'vitalSpO2'}[field];
  const el = document.getElementById(inputEl);
  const tag = document.getElementById('tag-' + (field === 'sbp' || field === 'dbp' ? 'bp' : field));
  if (val === null) { el.className = 'vital-input'; if(tag) { tag.style.display='none'; } }
  else {
    const status = getVitalStatus(field, val);
    el.className = 'vital-input ' + status;
    if (tag) {
      tag.style.display = status === 'normal' ? 'none' : 'inline';
      tag.className = 'alert-tag ' + (status === 'danger' ? 'red' : 'yellow');
      tag.textContent = status === 'danger' ? 'RED ALERT' : 'CAUTION';
    }
  }
  // Auto-detect fever flag
  if (field === 'temp') autoDetectFlags();
  updateDomainScore('vitals');
}

function getVitalStatus(field, val) {
  if (val === null) return '';
  switch(field) {
    case 'hr': return (val >= 110 || val <= 50) ? 'danger' : (val >= 100 || val <= 60) ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    case 'sbp': return (val <= 90 || val >= 180) ? 'danger' : (val <= 100 || val >= 160) ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    case 'dbp': return (val <= 50 || val >= 110) ? 'danger' : (val <= 60 || val >= 90) ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    case 'temp': return val > 101.5 ? 'danger' : val >= 100.5 ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    case 'rr': return (val >= 25 || val <= 8) ? 'danger' : (val >= 21 || val <= 11) ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    case 'spo2': return val < 90 ? 'danger' : val <= 95 ? 'caution' : 'normal';
    default: return 'normal';
  }
}

function handleFlag(cb) {
  const flagItem = cb.closest('.flag-item');
  const flagId = flagItem.id;
  // Handle surgery-specific flags
  if (flagId.startsWith('flag-bbl-') || flagId.startsWith('flag-bar-') || flagId.startsWith('flag-cs-')) {
    const parts = flagId.split('-');
    const surgKey = {bbl:'bbl',bar:'bariatric',cs:'cesarean'}[parts[1]];
    const idx = parseInt(parts[2]) - 1;
    if (surgKey) state.surgeryFlags[surgKey][idx] = cb.checked;
    flagItem.classList.toggle('checked', cb.checked);
    // Emergency for BBL fat embolism or bariatric anastomotic leak
    if ((flagId === 'flag-bbl-2' || flagId === 'flag-bar-1') && cb.checked) showEmergencyModal();
    updateDomainScore('redflags');
    return;
  }
  // Standard flags
  const idx = parseInt(flagId.replace('flag-','')) - 1;
  state.flags[idx] = cb.checked;
  flagItem.classList.toggle('checked', cb.checked);
  // Emergency modal for SOB, chest pain, or DVT
  if ((idx === 8 || idx === 9 || idx === 10) && cb.checked) showEmergencyModal();
  updateDomainScore('redflags');
}

function autoDetectFlags() {
  // Auto-check "no BM >24hr" flag
  if (state.bm === 'no-over24') { state.flags[1] = true; setFlagCheckbox(1, true); }
  // Auto-check vomiting flag
  if (state.vomiting === 'multiple') { state.flags[3] = true; setFlagCheckbox(3, true); }
  // Auto-check fever flag
  if (state.temp !== null && state.temp > 101.5) { state.flags[6] = true; setFlagCheckbox(6, true); }
  // Auto-check unable to eat flag
  if (state.intake === 'none') { state.flags[7] = true; setFlagCheckbox(7, true); }
  updateDomainScore('redflags');
}

function setFlagCheckbox(idx, checked) {
  const item = document.getElementById('flag-' + (idx + 1));
  if (item) {
    const cb = item.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
    cb.checked = checked;
    item.classList.toggle('checked', checked);
  }
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SCORING ENGINE
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function clamp(v, min, max) { return Math.max(min, Math.min(max, v)); }

function scorePain() {
  // If neither slider has been touched, pain is unanswered
  if (!state.painRestTouched && !state.painActivityTouched) return null;
  const restV = state.painRest !== null ? state.painRest : 0;
  const actV = state.painActivity !== null ? state.painActivity : 0;
  const restP = restV * 10;
  const actP = actV * 7;
  const managed = {yes:0, somewhat:-10, no:-25};
  const meds = {yes:0, partial:-5, no:-15, 'not-taking':0};
  let raw = 100 - (restP * 0.6 + actP * 0.4) / 10;
  if (state.painManaged !== null) raw += (managed[state.painManaged] || 0);
  if (state.painMeds !== null) raw += (meds[state.painMeds] || 0);
  // POD-adjusted modifier: higher pain is expected on POD 0-2
  const pod = getCurrentPOD();
  if (pod !== null) {
    const avgPain = (restV + actV) / 2;
    if (pod <= 1 && avgPain >= 5) raw += 15;        // POD 0-1: pain 5+ is expected, forgive some
    else if (pod <= 3 && avgPain >= 5) raw += 8;     // POD 2-3: moderate forgiveness
    else if (pod >= 10 && avgPain >= 5) raw -= 10;   // POD 10+: pain 5+ is concerning, penalize more
    else if (pod >= 14 && avgPain >= 4) raw -= 15;   // POD 14+: even moderate pain is a flag
  }
  return clamp(Math.round(raw), 0, 100);
}

function scoreVitals() {
  let penalty = 0, count = 0;
  if (state.hr !== null) { count++;
    if (state.hr >= 110 || state.hr <= 50) penalty += 30;
    else if (state.hr >= 100 || state.hr <= 60) penalty += 15;
  }
  if (state.sbp !== null) { count++;
    if (state.sbp <= 90 || state.sbp >= 180) penalty += 30;
    else if (state.sbp <= 100 || state.sbp >= 160) penalty += 15;
  }
  if (state.temp !== null) { count++;
    if (state.temp > 101.5) penalty += 25;
    else if (state.temp >= 100.5) penalty += 12;
  }
  if (state.rr !== null) { count++;
    if (state.rr >= 25 || state.rr <= 8) penalty += 25;
    else if (state.rr >= 21 || state.rr <= 11) penalty += 12;
  }
  if (state.spo2 !== null) { count++;
    if (state.spo2 < 90) penalty += 30;
    else if (state.spo2 <= 95) penalty += 15;
  }
  if (count === 0) return null;
  return clamp(Math.round(100 - penalty), 0, 100);
}

function scoreWound() {
  const scores = {
    drainage: {none:0,'minimal-clear':5,moderate:20,heavy:35,bloody:40,foul:50},
    opening: {no:0,slight:15,significant:35},
    redness: {none:0,mild:10,spreading:30},
    warmth: {no:0,yes:15},
    odor: {no:0,yes:25},
    swelling: {none:0,mild:5,moderate:15,severe:30}
  };
  let penalty = 0, count = 0;
  for (const key of Object.keys(scores)) {
    if (state[key] !== null) { count++; penalty += (scores[key][state[key]] || 0); }
  }
  if (count === 0) return null;
  return clamp(Math.round(100 - penalty), 0, 100);
}

function scoreGI() {
  const scores = {
    bm: {'yes-normal':0,'yes-loose':10,'no-under24':15,'no-over24':35},
    nausea: {none:0,mild:8,moderate:20,severe:35},
    vomiting: {none:0,once:15,multiple:35},
    intake: {normal:0,reduced:10,minimal:25,none:45},
    flatus: {yes:0,no:10}
  };
  let penalty = 0, count = 0;
  for (const key of Object.keys(scores)) {
    if (state[key] !== null) { count++; penalty += (scores[key][state[key]] || 0); }
  }
  if (count === 0) return null;
  return clamp(Math.round(100 - penalty), 0, 100);
}

function scoreFunctional() {
  const scores = {
    ambulation: {independent:0,'with-assistance':15,minimal:35,bedbound:55},
    adl: {full:0,partial:15,dependent:35},
    actlevel: {above:0,expected:0,below:20,'sig-below':40},
    dvt: {regular:0,some:10,minimal:25,none:40}
  };
  let penalty = 0, count = 0;
  for (const key of Object.keys(scores)) {
    if (state[key] !== null) { count++; penalty += (scores[key][state[key]] || 0); }
  }
  if (count === 0) return null;
  let raw = 100 - (penalty / Math.max(count,1));
  // POD-adjusted: limited mobility is expected early post-op
  const pod = getCurrentPOD();
  if (pod !== null) {
    if (pod <= 1 && (state.ambulation === 'minimal' || state.ambulation === 'bedbound')) raw += 20;
    else if (pod <= 3 && state.ambulation === 'with-assistance') raw += 10;
    else if (pod >= 7 && state.ambulation === 'bedbound') raw -= 15; // Concerning if still bedbound at POD 7+
  }
  return clamp(Math.round(raw), 0, 100);
}

function scoreMental() {
  const scores = {
    anxiety: {none:0,mild:10,moderate:25,severe:45},
    sleep: {good:0,fair:10,poor:25,unable:40},
    mood: {positive:0,neutral:5,low:25,'very-low':45},
    fear: {none:0,some:5,significant:20,overwhelming:40},
    support: {strong:0,adequate:5,limited:20,none:35}
  };
  let penalty = 0, count = 0;
  for (const key of Object.keys(scores)) {
    if (state[key] !== null) { count++; penalty += (scores[key][state[key]] || 0); }
  }
  if (count === 0) return null;
  return clamp(Math.round(100 - (penalty / Math.max(count,1))), 0, 100);
}

function scoreRedFlags() {
  const flagCount = state.flags.filter(Boolean).length;
  // Count surgery-specific flags
  let surgFlagCount = 0;
  let surgEmergency = false;
  for (const key of Object.keys(state.surgeryFlags)) {
    state.surgeryFlags[key].forEach((f, i) => {
      if (f) {
        surgFlagCount++;
        // BBL fat embolism (index 1) and bariatric anastomotic leak (index 0) are emergency-level
        if ((key === 'bbl' && i === 1) || (key === 'bariatric' && i === 0)) surgEmergency = true;
      }
    });
  }
  const totalFlags = flagCount + surgFlagCount;
  const emergency = (state.flags[8] || state.flags[9] || state.flags[10] || surgEmergency);
  if (emergency) return 0;
  if (totalFlags >= 4) return 10;
  if (totalFlags === 3) return 25;
  if (totalFlags === 2) return 40;
  if (totalFlags === 1) return 60;
  return 100;
}

function getCurrentPOD() {
  const podText = document.getElementById('podNum').textContent;
  return podText === '—' ? null : parseInt(podText);
}

function calculateComposite() {
  // Vitals optional — weight redistributed to symptom domains
  // When vitals are provided, they contribute to the score; when absent, other domains fill the weight
  const weights = {pain:0.15, vitals:0.10, wound:0.20, gi:0.10, functional:0.10, mental:0.15, redflags:0.20};
  const scores = {
    pain: scorePain(),
    vitals: scoreVitals(),
    wound: scoreWound(),
    gi: scoreGI(),
    functional: scoreFunctional(),
    mental: scoreMental(),
    redflags: scoreRedFlags()
  };
  let totalWeight = 0, weightedSum = 0;
  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(scores)) {
    if (v !== null) { totalWeight += weights[k]; weightedSum += v * weights[k]; }
  }
  if (totalWeight === 0) return {composite:null, scores, risk:null};
  let composite = Math.round(weightedSum / totalWeight);
  // Emergency override
  if (state.flags[8] || state.flags[9]) composite = Math.min(composite, 25);
  return {composite, scores, risk: classifyRisk(composite)};
}

function classifyRisk(score) {
  if (score === null) return {level:'incomplete',color:'#888',label:'Incomplete',action:'Complete all domains'};
  if (score >= 80) return {level:'low',color:'#16A34A',label:'Low Risk',action:'Routine follow-up'};
  if (score >= 60) return {level:'moderate',color:'#CA8A04',label:'Moderate Risk',action:'Enhanced monitoring recommended'};
  if (score >= 40) return {level:'high',color:'#D97706',label:'High Risk',action:'Physician review needed'};
  return {level:'critical',color:'#DC2626',label:'Critical Risk',action:'Immediate contact / consider ED'};
}

function updateDomainScore(domain) {
  const fns = {pain:scorePain,vitals:scoreVitals,wound:scoreWound,gi:scoreGI,functional:scoreFunctional,mental:scoreMental,redflags:scoreRedFlags};
  const score = fns[domain]();
  const el = document.getElementById('score-' + domain);
  if (el) {
    el.textContent = score !== null ? score : '—';
    if (score !== null) {
      el.style.color = score >= 80 ? 'var(--status-green)' : score >= 60 ? 'var(--status-yellow)' : score >= 40 ? 'var(--status-orange)' : 'var(--status-red)';
    } else { el.style.color = ''; }
  }
  // Update tab dot
  const dot = document.getElementById('dot-' + domain);
  if (dot && score !== null) {
    dot.className = 'tab-dot ' + (score >= 80 ? 'green' : score >= 60 ? 'yellow' : 'red');
  }
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SUMMARY RENDERING
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderSummary() {
  const {composite, scores, risk} = calculateComposite();
  renderGauge(composite, risk);
  renderDomainBars(scores);
  renderAlerts(scores);
  renderTrend();
}

function renderGauge(score, risk) {
  const svg = document.getElementById('gaugeChart');
  const cx = 110, cy = 120, r = 90;
  const startAngle = 180, endAngle = 360;
  const totalArc = endAngle - startAngle;

  let bgPath = describeArc(cx, cy, r, startAngle, endAngle);
  let scorePath = '';
  let color = '#ccc';

  if (score !== null && risk) {
    const scoreAngle = startAngle + (score / 100) * totalArc;
    scorePath = describeArc(cx, cy, r, startAngle, scoreAngle);
    color = risk.color;
  }

  svg.innerHTML = `
    <path d="${bgPath}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    ${scorePath ? `<path d="${scorePath}" fill="none" stroke="${color}" stroke-width="18" stroke-linecap="round"/>` : ''}
    <text x="${cx}" y="${cy - 10}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Playfair Display,serif" font-size="42" font-weight="700" fill="${color}">${score !== null ? score : '—'}</text>
    <text x="${cx}" y="${cy + 14}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="DM Sans,sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#999">/100</text>
  `;

  const badge = document.getElementById('riskBadge');
  const action = document.getElementById('riskAction');
  if (risk) {
    badge.textContent = risk.label;
    badge.style.background = risk.color + '18';
    badge.style.color = risk.color;
    action.textContent = risk.action;
  } else {
    badge.textContent = 'Incomplete';
    badge.style.background = '#eee';
    badge.style.color = '#888';
    action.textContent = 'Complete all domains for scoring';
  }
}

function describeArc(cx, cy, radius, startAngle, endAngle) {
  const start = polarToCartesian(cx, cy, radius, endAngle);
  const end = polarToCartesian(cx, cy, radius, startAngle);
  const largeArc = endAngle - startAngle <= 180 ? '0' : '1';
  return `M ${start.x} ${start.y} A ${radius} ${radius} 0 ${largeArc} 0 ${end.x} ${end.y}`;
}

function polarToCartesian(cx, cy, radius, angleDeg) {
  const rad = (angleDeg) * Math.PI / 180;
  return { x: cx + radius * Math.cos(rad), y: cy + radius * Math.sin(rad) };
}

function renderDomainBars(scores) {
  const container = document.getElementById('domainBars');
  const labels = {pain:'Pain',vitals:'Vitals',wound:'Wound',gi:'GI',functional:'Function',mental:'Mental',redflags:'Red Flags'};
  let html = '';
  for (const [key, label] of Object.entries(labels)) {
    const val = scores[key];
    const color = val === null ? '#ccc' : val >= 80 ? '#16A34A' : val >= 60 ? '#CA8A04' : val >= 40 ? '#D97706' : '#DC2626';
    const width = val !== null ? val : 0;
    html += `<div class="domain-bar-row">
      <span class="domain-bar-label">${label}</span>
      <div class="domain-bar-track"><div class="domain-bar-fill" style="width:${width}%;background:${color};"></div></div>
      <span class="domain-bar-score" style="color:${color}">${val !== null ? val : '—'}</span>
    </div>`;
  }
  container.innerHTML = html;
}

function renderAlerts(scores) {
  const container = document.getElementById('alertsList');
  let alerts = [];
  // Vital alerts
  const vitalChecks = [
    {field:'hr',label:'Heart Rate',val:state.hr},
    {field:'sbp',label:'Systolic BP',val:state.sbp},
    {field:'temp',label:'Temperature',val:state.temp},
    {field:'rr',label:'Respiratory Rate',val:state.rr},
    {field:'spo2',label:'SpO₂',val:state.spo2}
  ];
  for (const v of vitalChecks) {
    if (v.val === null) continue;
    const status = getVitalStatus(v.field, v.val);
    if (status === 'danger') alerts.push({type:'red', msg:`${v.label}: ${v.val} — RED ALERT`});
    else if (status === 'caution') alerts.push({type:'yellow', msg:`${v.label}: ${v.val} — Caution`});
  }
  // Red flags
  state.flags.forEach((f, i) => {
    if (f) alerts.push({type: i >= 8 ? 'red' : 'yellow', msg: FLAG_LABELS[i] + (i >= 8 ? ' (EMERGENCY)' : '')});
  });
  // Surgery-specific flags
  for (const [key, flags] of Object.entries(state.surgeryFlags)) {
    if (SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key]) {
      flags.forEach((f, i) => {
        if (f) {
          const isEmergency = (key === 'bbl' && i === 1) || (key === 'bariatric' && i === 0);
          alerts.push({type: isEmergency ? 'red' : 'yellow', msg: SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key][i] + (isEmergency ? ' (EMERGENCY)' : '')});
        }
      });
    }
  }

  if (alerts.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = '<div class="alert-item green-msg"><span class="alert-icon">&#10003;</span> No alerts at this time.</div>';
    return;
  }
  // Sort: red first
  alerts.sort((a, b) => (a.type === 'red' ? 0 : 1) - (b.type === 'red' ? 0 : 1));
  container.innerHTML = alerts.map(a =>
    `<div class="alert-item ${a.type}-alert"><span class="alert-icon">${a.type === 'red' ? '&#9888;' : '&#9888;'}</span> ${a.msg}</div>`
  ).join('');
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   TREND CHART (SVG)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function renderTrend() {
  const container = document.getElementById('trendContainer');
  const history = getPatientHistory();
  if (!history || history.length === 0) {
    container.innerHTML = '<div class="trend-empty">Save assessments to see recovery trend over time.</div>';
    return;
  }
  const W = 400, H = 180, padL = 45, padR = 15, padT = 15, padB = 30;
  const chartW = W - padL - padR, chartH = H - padT - padB;

  let svg = `<svg viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" width="100%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet" style="max-height:200px;">`;
  // Risk zone backgrounds
  const zones = [{y1:0,y2:20,color:'#FEE2E2'},{y1:20,y2:40,color:'#FEE2E2'},{y1:40,y2:60,color:'#FFF7ED'},{y1:60,y2:80,color:'#FEF9C3'},{y1:80,y2:100,color:'#DCFCE7'}];
  for (const z of zones) {
    const ry = padT + chartH - (z.y2/100)*chartH;
    const rh = ((z.y2-z.y1)/100)*chartH;
    svg += `<rect x="${padL}" y="${ry}" width="${chartW}" height="${rh}" fill="${z.color}" opacity="0.5"/>`;
  }
  // Grid lines
  for (let v = 0; v <= 100; v += 20) {
    const y = padT + chartH - (v/100)*chartH;
    svg += `<line x1="${padL}" y1="${y}" x2="${padL+chartW}" y2="${y}" stroke="#ddd" stroke-width="0.5"/>`;
    svg += `<text x="${padL-5}" y="${y+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" fill="#999" font-family="DM Sans">${v}</text>`;
  }
  // Data points + line
  const n = history.length;
  const points = history.map((h, i) => {
    const x = padL + (n === 1 ? chartW/2 : (i/(n-1))*chartW);
    const y = padT + chartH - (h.composite/100)*chartH;
    return {x, y, ...h};
  });
  if (points.length > 1) {
    const lineD = points.map((p,i) => `${i===0?'M':'L'}${p.x},${p.y}`).join(' ');
    svg += `<path d="${lineD}" fill="none" stroke="#2D5A3D" stroke-width="2.5"/>`;
  }
  for (const p of points) {
    const risk = classifyRisk(p.composite);
    svg += `<circle cx="${p.x}" cy="${p.y}" r="5" fill="${risk.color}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="2"/>`;
    svg += `<text x="${p.x}" y="${p.y-10}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${risk.color}" font-family="DM Sans">${p.composite}</text>`;
  }
  // X labels
  for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
    svg += `<text x="${points[i].x}" y="${H-5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#999" font-family="DM Sans">POD ${points[i].pod}</text>`;
  }
  svg += '</svg>';
  container.innerHTML = svg;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   HISTORY (localStorage)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function getPatientKey() {
  const name = document.getElementById('patientName').value.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g,'-') || 'unnamed';
  const date = document.getElementById('surgeryDate').value || 'nodate';
  return name + '_' + date;
}

function getHistory() {
  try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('opwell_recovery_history') || '{}'); }
  catch { return {}; }
}

function getPatientHistory() {
  const key = getPatientKey();
  const h = getHistory();
  return (h[key] && h[key].assessments) || [];
}

function saveToHistory() {
  const {composite, scores, risk} = calculateComposite();
  if (composite === null) { showToast('Complete at least one domain before saving.'); return; }
  const key = getPatientKey();
  const h = getHistory();
  if (!h[key]) h[key] = {patient:{name:document.getElementById('patientName').value,surgeryType:document.getElementById('surgeryType').value,surgeryDate:document.getElementById('surgeryDate').value},assessments:[]};
  const podText = document.getElementById('podNum').textContent;
  h[key].assessments.push({
    date: new Date().toISOString(),
    pod: podText === '—' ? 0 : parseInt(podText),
    composite,
    scores: {...scores},
    riskLevel: risk ? risk.level : 'incomplete',
    flagsTriggered: state.flags.map((f,i) => f ? FLAG_LABELS[i] : null).filter(Boolean)
  });
  localStorage.setItem('opwell_recovery_history', JSON.stringify(h));
  showToast('Assessment saved to history.');
  if (document.querySelector('[data-tab="summary"]').classList.contains('active')) renderTrend();
}

function clearAssessment() {
  if (!confirm('Clear all current assessment data?')) return;
  // Reset state
  state.painRest = null; state.painActivity = null; state.painRestTouched = false; state.painActivityTouched = false;
  state.painLocation = ''; state.painManaged = null; state.painMeds = null;
  state.hr = null; state.sbp = null; state.dbp = null; state.temp = null; state.rr = null; state.spo2 = null;
  state.drainage = null; state.opening = null; state.redness = null; state.warmth = null; state.odor = null; state.swelling = null; state.woundNotes = '';
  state.bm = null; state.lastBM = ''; state.nausea = null; state.vomiting = null; state.intake = null; state.flatus = null;
  state.ambulation = null; state.adl = null; state.actlevel = null; state.dvt = null;
  state.anxiety = null; state.sleep = null; state.mood = null; state.fear = null; state.support = null;
  state.flags = [false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false,false];
  state.surgeryFlags = {bbl:[false,false,false], bariatric:[false,false,false], cesarean:[false,false,false]};
  // Reset UI
  document.querySelectorAll('input[type="radio"]').forEach(r => r.checked = false);
  document.querySelectorAll('input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(c => c.checked = false);
  document.querySelectorAll('.radio-opt').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected','selected-yellow','selected-red'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.flag-item').forEach(f => f.classList.remove('checked'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.vital-input').forEach(v => { v.value = ''; v.className = 'vital-input'; });
  document.querySelectorAll('.alert-tag').forEach(t => t.style.display = 'none');
  document.querySelectorAll('.q-group').forEach(g => g.className = 'q-group');
  document.getElementById('painRest').value = 5; document.getElementById('painRest').style.opacity = '0.4';
  document.getElementById('painActivity').value = 5; document.getElementById('painActivity').style.opacity = '0.4';
  document.getElementById('painRestVal').textContent = '—'; document.getElementById('painRestVal').style.color = '#999'; document.getElementById('painRestVal').className = 'slider-val';
  document.getElementById('painActivityVal').textContent = '—'; document.getElementById('painActivityVal').style.color = '#999'; document.getElementById('painActivityVal').className = 'slider-val';
  const prHint = document.getElementById('painRestHint'); if (prHint) prHint.style.display = 'block';
  const paHint = document.getElementById('painActivityHint'); if (paHint) paHint.style.display = 'block';
  document.getElementById('painLocation').value = '';
  document.getElementById('lastBM').value = '';
  document.getElementById('woundNotes').value = '';
  ['pain','vitals','wound','gi','functional','mental','redflags'].forEach(d => {
    const el = document.getElementById('score-' + d);
    if (el) { el.textContent = '—'; el.style.color = ''; }
    const dot = document.getElementById('dot-' + d);
    if (dot) dot.className = 'tab-dot';
  });
  switchTab('pain');
  showToast('Assessment cleared.');
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   EMERGENCY MODAL
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function showEmergencyModal() {
  const list = document.getElementById('emergencyFlagList');
  let items = '';
  if (state.flags[8]) items += '<li>Shortness of breath or difficulty breathing</li>';
  if (state.flags[9]) items += '<li>Chest pain</li>';
  if (state.flags[10]) items += '<li>Unilateral leg swelling or calf pain (DVT risk)</li>';
  // Surgery-specific emergencies
  if (state.surgeryFlags.bbl[1]) items += '<li>Buttock pain with tachycardia — possible fat embolism (BBL)</li>';
  if (state.surgeryFlags.bariatric[0]) items += '<li>Left shoulder pain with tachycardia — possible anastomotic leak (Bariatric)</li>';
  list.innerHTML = items;
  document.getElementById('emergencyModal').classList.add('show');
}
function dismissModal() { document.getElementById('emergencyModal').classList.remove('show'); }

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   CHART NOTE GENERATOR
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function copyChartNote() {
  const {composite, scores, risk} = calculateComposite();
  const name = document.getElementById('patientName').value || '[Not entered]';
  const surgType = document.getElementById('surgeryType');
  const surgText = surgType.selectedIndex > 0 ? surgType.options[surgType.selectedIndex].text : '[Not selected]';
  const surgDate = document.getElementById('surgeryDate').value || '[Not entered]';
  const pod = document.getElementById('podNum').textContent;
  const now = new Date().toLocaleString();

  const labelMap = {
    painManaged: {yes:'Yes',somewhat:'Somewhat',no:'No'},
    painMeds: {yes:'Yes',partial:'Partially',no:'No','not-taking':'Not taking medication'},
    drainage: {none:'None','minimal-clear':'Minimal, clear','moderate':'Moderate','heavy':'Heavy','bloody':'Bloody','foul':'Foul-smelling'},
    opening: {no:'No',slight:'Slight separation',significant:'Significant opening'},
    redness: {none:'None',mild:'Mild',spreading:'Spreading'},
    warmth: {no:'No',yes:'Yes'}, odor: {no:'No',yes:'Yes'},
    swelling: {none:'None',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},
    bm: {'yes-normal':'Yes, normal','yes-loose':'Yes, loose/diarrhea','no-under24':'No (<24hr)','no-over24':'No (>24hr)'},
    nausea: {none:'None',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},
    vomiting: {none:'None',once:'Once',multiple:'Multiple episodes'},
    intake: {normal:'Normal',reduced:'Reduced',minimal:'Minimal (sips only)',none:'None (NPO)'},
    flatus: {yes:'Yes',no:'No'},
    ambulation: {independent:'Independent','with-assistance':'With assistance',minimal:'Minimal',bedbound:'Bedbound'},
    adl: {full:'Fully independent',partial:'Needs some help',dependent:'Dependent'},
    actlevel: {above:'Above expected',expected:'As expected',below:'Below expected','sig-below':'Significantly below'},
    dvt: {regular:'Walking regularly',some:'Some walking',minimal:'Minimal',none:'Not walking'},
    anxiety: {none:'None/minimal',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},
    sleep: {good:'Good',fair:'Fair',poor:'Poor',unable:'Unable to sleep'},
    mood: {positive:'Positive',neutral:'Neutral',low:'Low','very-low':'Very low'},
    fear: {none:'None',some:'Some',significant:'Significant',overwhelming:'Overwhelming'},
    support: {strong:'Strong',adequate:'Adequate',limited:'Limited',none:'None'}
  };
  const lbl = (field) => { const m = labelMap[field]; return m && state[field] ? m[state[field]] : (state[field] || '—'); };
  const sLbl = (v) => v !== null ? v + '/100' : '—';

  let flagsArr = state.flags.map((f,i) => f ? '  [x] ' + FLAG_LABELS[i] + (i >= 8 ? ' — EMERGENCY' : '') : null).filter(Boolean);
  // Surgery-specific flags
  for (const [key, flags] of Object.entries(state.surgeryFlags)) {
    if (SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key]) {
      flags.forEach((f, i) => { if (f) flagsArr.push('  [x] ' + SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key][i] + ' (' + key.toUpperCase() + ')'); });
    }
  }
  const flagsText = flagsArr.length > 0 ? flagsArr.join('\n') : '  No red flags identified.';

  // Alerts
  let alertsText = '';
  const vChecks = [{f:'hr',l:'Heart Rate'},{f:'sbp',l:'Systolic BP'},{f:'temp',l:'Temperature'},{f:'rr',l:'Respiratory Rate'},{f:'spo2',l:'SpO2'}];
  for (const v of vChecks) {
    if (state[v.f] === null) continue;
    const s = getVitalStatus(v.f, state[v.f]);
    if (s === 'danger') alertsText += '  RED: ' + v.l + ' = ' + state[v.f] + '\n';
    else if (s === 'caution') alertsText += '  YELLOW: ' + v.l + ' = ' + state[v.f] + '\n';
  }
  if (!alertsText) alertsText = '  No vital sign alerts.\n';

  // Trend
  const history = getPatientHistory();
  let trendText = '';
  if (history.length > 0) {
    trendText = '\nTREND:\n';
    for (const h of history) {
      trendText += `  POD ${h.pod} (${new Date(h.date).toLocaleDateString()}): ${h.composite}/100 — ${h.riskLevel}\n`;
    }
    if (composite !== null) {
      trendText += `  Current: ${composite}/100 — ${risk.label}\n`;
      if (history.length >= 1) {
        const last = history[history.length - 1].composite;
        const diff = composite - last;
        trendText += `  Trajectory: ${diff > 5 ? 'Improving' : diff < -5 ? 'Declining' : 'Stable'}\n`;
      }
    }
  }

  const note = `POST-OPERATIVE RECOVERY ASSESSMENT
OpWell Concierge™ — Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD
(678) 235-5822 | opwellconcierge.com
────────────────────────────────────────────────
Patient: ${name}
Surgery: ${surgText}
Surgery Date: ${surgDate}
Post-Operative Day: ${pod}
Assessment Date: ${now}
────────────────────────────────────────────────

COMPOSITE RECOVERY SCORE: ${composite !== null ? composite + '/100' : 'Incomplete'} — ${risk ? risk.label : 'N/A'}
Recommended Action: ${risk ? risk.action : 'Complete assessment'}

DOMAIN SCORES:
  Pain Control:         ${sLbl(scores.pain)}
  Vital Sign Stability: ${sLbl(scores.vitals)}
  Wound Healing:        ${sLbl(scores.wound)}
  GI Function:          ${sLbl(scores.gi)}
  Functional Recovery:  ${sLbl(scores.functional)}
  Emotional State:      ${sLbl(scores.mental)}
  Red Flag Screen:      ${sLbl(scores.redflags)}

────────────────────────────────────────────────
PAIN ASSESSMENT:
  Pain at rest: ${state.painRestTouched ? state.painRest + '/10 NRS' : 'Not assessed'}
  Pain with activity: ${state.painActivityTouched ? state.painActivity + '/10 NRS' : 'Not assessed'}
  Location: ${state.painLocation || '—'}
  Pain managed: ${lbl('painManaged')}
  Medication effective: ${lbl('painMeds')}

VITAL SIGNS:
  HR: ${state.hr !== null ? state.hr + ' bpm' : '—'}
  BP: ${state.sbp !== null ? state.sbp + '/' + (state.dbp || '—') + ' mmHg' : '—'}
  Temp: ${state.temp !== null ? state.temp + '°F' : '—'}
  RR: ${state.rr !== null ? state.rr + ' breaths/min' : '—'}
  SpO2: ${state.spo2 !== null ? state.spo2 + '%' : '—'}

WOUND ASSESSMENT:
  Drainage: ${lbl('drainage')}
  Opening/separation: ${lbl('opening')}
  Redness: ${lbl('redness')}
  Warmth: ${lbl('warmth')}
  Odor: ${lbl('odor')}
  Swelling: ${lbl('swelling')}
  Notes: ${state.woundNotes || '—'}

GI FUNCTION:
  Bowel movement: ${lbl('bm')}
  Last BM: ${state.lastBM || '—'}
  Nausea: ${lbl('nausea')}
  Vomiting: ${lbl('vomiting')}
  Oral intake: ${lbl('intake')}
  Flatus: ${lbl('flatus')}

FUNCTIONAL STATUS:
  Ambulation: ${lbl('ambulation')}
  ADL independence: ${lbl('adl')}
  Activity level: ${lbl('actlevel')}
  DVT prevention: ${lbl('dvt')}

EMOTIONAL/MENTAL STATE:
  Anxiety: ${lbl('anxiety')}
  Sleep quality: ${lbl('sleep')}
  Mood: ${lbl('mood')}
  Fear of complications: ${lbl('fear')}
  Social support: ${lbl('support')}

RED FLAG SCREENING:
${flagsText}

ALERTS:
${alertsText}
${trendText}
────────────────────────────────────────────────
This assessment was generated using the OpWell Concierge™
Post-Op Recovery Check-In Tool.
Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD | (678) 235-5822
opwellconcierge.com`;

  navigator.clipboard.writeText(note).then(() => {
    showToast('Copied to clipboard — ready to paste into chart.');
  }).catch(() => {
    // Fallback
    const ta = document.createElement('textarea');
    ta.value = note; document.body.appendChild(ta); ta.select();
    try { document.execCommand('copy'); showToast('Copied to clipboard.'); }
    catch { showToast('Copy failed — please select and copy manually.'); }
    document.body.removeChild(ta);
  });
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   PRINT
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function printAssessment() {
  const {composite, scores, risk} = calculateComposite();
  const name = document.getElementById('patientName').value || '[Not entered]';
  const surgType = document.getElementById('surgeryType');
  const surgText = surgType.selectedIndex > 0 ? surgType.options[surgType.selectedIndex].text : '[Not selected]';
  const surgDate = document.getElementById('surgeryDate').value || '[Not entered]';
  const pod = document.getElementById('podNum').textContent;

  const labelMap = {
    painManaged:{yes:'Yes',somewhat:'Somewhat',no:'No'},painMeds:{yes:'Yes',partial:'Partially',no:'No','not-taking':'Not taking'},
    drainage:{none:'None','minimal-clear':'Minimal, clear',moderate:'Moderate',heavy:'Heavy',bloody:'Bloody',foul:'Foul-smelling'},
    opening:{no:'No',slight:'Slight separation',significant:'Significant opening'},redness:{none:'None',mild:'Mild',spreading:'Spreading'},
    warmth:{no:'No',yes:'Yes'},odor:{no:'No',yes:'Yes'},swelling:{none:'None',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},
    bm:{'yes-normal':'Yes, normal','yes-loose':'Yes, loose','no-under24':'No (<24hr)','no-over24':'No (>24hr)'},
    nausea:{none:'None',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},vomiting:{none:'None',once:'Once',multiple:'Multiple'},
    intake:{normal:'Normal',reduced:'Reduced',minimal:'Minimal',none:'NPO'},flatus:{yes:'Yes',no:'No'},
    ambulation:{independent:'Independent','with-assistance':'With assistance',minimal:'Minimal',bedbound:'Bedbound'},
    adl:{full:'Independent',partial:'Needs help',dependent:'Dependent'},actlevel:{above:'Above expected',expected:'As expected',below:'Below',
    'sig-below':'Significantly below'},dvt:{regular:'Walking regularly',some:'Some',minimal:'Minimal',none:'None'},
    anxiety:{none:'None',mild:'Mild',moderate:'Moderate',severe:'Severe'},sleep:{good:'Good',fair:'Fair',poor:'Poor',unable:'Unable'},
    mood:{positive:'Positive',neutral:'Neutral',low:'Low','very-low':'Very low'},fear:{none:'None',some:'Some',significant:'Significant',overwhelming:'Overwhelming'},
    support:{strong:'Strong',adequate:'Adequate',limited:'Limited',none:'None'}
  };
  const lbl = (f) => { const m = labelMap[f]; return m && state[f] ? m[state[f]] : '—'; };

  const riskColor = risk ? risk.color : '#888';
  let flagsHtmlArr = state.flags.map((f,i) => f ? `<div style="padding:4px 0;color:${i>=8?'#DC2626':'#CA8A04'};">&#9888; ${FLAG_LABELS[i]}${i>=8?' — EMERGENCY':''}</div>` : '').filter(Boolean);
  for (const [key, flags] of Object.entries(state.surgeryFlags)) {
    if (SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key]) {
      flags.forEach((f, i) => { if (f) flagsHtmlArr.push(`<div style="padding:4px 0;color:#DC2626;">&#9888; ${SURGERY_FLAG_LABELS[key][i]} (${key.toUpperCase()})</div>`); });
    }
  }
  const flagsHtml = flagsHtmlArr.length > 0 ? flagsHtmlArr.join('') : '<div style="color:#16A34A;">No red flags identified.</div>';

  const win = window.open('','_blank');
  win.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>Post-Op Assessment — ${name}</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@600;700&family=DM+Sans:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
body{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;color:#1C1C1C;padding:24px;max-width:750px;margin:0 auto;}
h1{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.hdr{border-bottom:2px solid #2D5A3D;padding-bottom:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.hdr .sub{font-size:0.8rem;color:#5A5A5A;}
.meta{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4px 20px;margin-bottom:16px;font-size:0.85rem;}
.meta b{color:#2D5A3D;}
.score-box{text-align:center;padding:16px;border:2px solid ${riskColor};border-radius:12px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.score-box .num{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:700;color:${riskColor};}
.score-box .lbl{font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:700;color:${riskColor};margin-top:4px;}
.score-box .act{font-size:0.8rem;color:#5A5A5A;margin-top:2px;}
.domain-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-bottom:16px;}
.domain-table td{padding:5px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid #eee;font-size:0.85rem;}
.domain-table td:first-child{font-weight:600;width:140px;}
.section{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:#2D5A3D;margin:14px 0 6px;border-bottom:1px solid #ddd;padding-bottom:3px;}
.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:140px 1fr;gap:2px 12px;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:10px;}
.detail-grid .dlbl{font-weight:600;color:#5A5A5A;}
.footer{margin-top:20px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #ddd;font-size:0.75rem;color:#999;text-align:center;}
@media print{body{padding:12px;}}
</style></head><body>
<div class="hdr"><h1>Post-Op Recovery Assessment</h1><div class="sub">OpWell Concierge™ — Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD | (678) 235-5822 | opwellconcierge.com</div></div>
<div class="meta"><div><b>Patient:</b> ${name}</div><div><b>Surgery:</b> ${surgText}</div><div><b>Surgery Date:</b> ${surgDate}</div><div><b>POD:</b> ${pod}</div><div><b>Assessment Date:</b> ${new Date().toLocaleString()}</div></div>
<div class="score-box"><div class="num">${composite !== null ? composite : '—'}</div><div>/100</div><div class="lbl">${risk?risk.label:'Incomplete'}</div><div class="act">${risk?risk.action:'Complete assessment'}</div></div>
<table class="domain-table"><tr><td>Pain Control</td><td>${scores.pain !== null ? scores.pain : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>Vital Stability</td><td>${scores.vitals !== null ? scores.vitals : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>Wound Healing</td><td>${scores.wound !== null ? scores.wound : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>GI Function</td><td>${scores.gi !== null ? scores.gi : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>Functional Recovery</td><td>${scores.functional !== null ? scores.functional : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>Emotional State</td><td>${scores.mental !== null ? scores.mental : '—'}/100</td></tr><tr><td>Red Flag Screen</td><td>${scores.redflags !== null ? scores.redflags : '—'}/100</td></tr></table>
<div class="section">Pain</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">Rest:</span><span>${state.painRestTouched ? state.painRest+'/10' : 'Not assessed'}</span><span class="dlbl">Activity:</span><span>${state.painActivityTouched ? state.painActivity+'/10' : 'Not assessed'}</span><span class="dlbl">Location:</span><span>${state.painLocation||'—'}</span><span class="dlbl">Managed:</span><span>${lbl('painManaged')}</span><span class="dlbl">Meds effective:</span><span>${lbl('painMeds')}</span></div>
<div class="section">Vitals</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">HR:</span><span>${state.hr!==null?state.hr+' bpm':'—'}</span><span class="dlbl">BP:</span><span>${state.sbp!==null?state.sbp+'/'+(state.dbp||'—')+' mmHg':'—'}</span><span class="dlbl">Temp:</span><span>${state.temp!==null?state.temp+'°F':'—'}</span><span class="dlbl">RR:</span><span>${state.rr!==null?state.rr+'/min':'—'}</span><span class="dlbl">SpO₂:</span><span>${state.spo2!==null?state.spo2+'%':'—'}</span></div>
<div class="section">Wound</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">Drainage:</span><span>${lbl('drainage')}</span><span class="dlbl">Opening:</span><span>${lbl('opening')}</span><span class="dlbl">Redness:</span><span>${lbl('redness')}</span><span class="dlbl">Warmth:</span><span>${lbl('warmth')}</span><span class="dlbl">Odor:</span><span>${lbl('odor')}</span><span class="dlbl">Swelling:</span><span>${lbl('swelling')}</span></div>
<div class="section">GI Function</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">Bowel movement:</span><span>${lbl('bm')}</span><span class="dlbl">Nausea:</span><span>${lbl('nausea')}</span><span class="dlbl">Vomiting:</span><span>${lbl('vomiting')}</span><span class="dlbl">Oral intake:</span><span>${lbl('intake')}</span><span class="dlbl">Flatus:</span><span>${lbl('flatus')}</span></div>
<div class="section">Functional</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">Ambulation:</span><span>${lbl('ambulation')}</span><span class="dlbl">ADL:</span><span>${lbl('adl')}</span><span class="dlbl">Activity level:</span><span>${lbl('actlevel')}</span><span class="dlbl">DVT prevention:</span><span>${lbl('dvt')}</span></div>
<div class="section">Mental / Emotional</div><div class="detail-grid"><span class="dlbl">Anxiety:</span><span>${lbl('anxiety')}</span><span class="dlbl">Sleep:</span><span>${lbl('sleep')}</span><span class="dlbl">Mood:</span><span>${lbl('mood')}</span><span class="dlbl">Fear:</span><span>${lbl('fear')}</span><span class="dlbl">Support:</span><span>${lbl('support')}</span></div>
<div class="section">Red Flags</div>${flagsHtml}
<div class="footer">OpWell Concierge™ Post-Op Recovery Check-In Tool | Dr. Ornella Oluwole, MD | opwellconcierge.com</div>
<script>window.onload=function(){setTimeout(function(){window.print();},400);}<\/script>
</body></html>`);
  win.document.close();
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   TOAST
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function showToast(msg) {
  const t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent = msg;
  t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 3200);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   INIT
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
(function init() {
  // Set today as default for quick use
  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  // Don't auto-set surgery date — let user choose
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>


=================================================================================
FILE: ./pricing.html
=================================================================================

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

        <h2>Why Post Op Recovery Support Matters</h2>
        <p>The days and weeks after surgery are critical — yet most patients manage post-operative recovery at home alone. Complications can develop silently. Pain management is inadequate. Wound healing stalls. Medication interactions go unnoticed.</p>
        <p>OpWell provides physician-led post op recovery support starting within 72 hours of surgery with weekly check-ins for 30 days. Comprehensive recovery after surgery when you need it most.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="section">
        <h2>Our Recovery Support Includes</h2>
        <ul class="services-list">
          <li>Initial post-op check-in within 72 hours of surgery</li>
          <li>Weekly follow-up consultations for 30 days</li>
          <li>Pain management optimization & medication adjustments</li>
          <li>Wound healing assessment & infection monitoring</li>
          <li>Nutrition & physical activity guidance</li>
          <li>Early identification of complications (blood clots, seromas, infection)</li>
          <li>Comorbidity management (diabetes, hypertension, anticoagulation)</li>
          <li>Mental health & anxiety support coordination</li>
        </ul>
      </div>

      <div class="section">
        <h2>Your Recovery Timeline</h2>
        <div class="timeline">
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <h3>Days 1-3 Post-Op</h3>
            <p>Your initial check-in within 72 hours. We assess pain control, wound status, medication side effects, and any concerning symptoms. This is when early complications are most likely to emerge — and when early intervention prevents bigger problems.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <h3>Weeks 1-2</h3>
            <p>Weekly consultations focus on pain management optimization, nutrition, physical activity readiness, and wound healing. We catch infections early and adjust medications as your body heals.</p>
          </div>
          <div class="timeline-item">
            <h3>Weeks 3-4</h3>
            <p>Final check-in to confirm healing trajectory, clarify activity restrictions, and discuss any lingering concerns as you transition back to normal life.</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section">
        <h2>Who Benefits?</h2>
        <div class="highlight">
          <p><strong>All surgical patients</strong> benefit from post-operative support — but especially bariatric surgery patients, cosmetic surgery patients, and anyone with comorbidities (diabetes, hypertension, sleep apnea, obesity) that complicate recovery.</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="section">
        <h2>How It Works</h2>
        <ol style="margin: 1.5rem 0; padding-left: 2rem;">
          <li style="margin: 0.75rem 0;">Book your post-operative care consultation before or after surgery</li>
          <li style="margin: 0.75rem 0;">Initial check-in within 72 hours of surgery via telehealth</li>
          <li style="margin: 0.75rem 0;">Weekly follow-ups for 30 days (or longer if needed)</li>
          <li style="margin: 0.75rem 0;">Direct access to physician team for complications or urgent questions</li>
        </ol>
      </div>

      <div class="section">
        <h2>Ready to Optimize Your Recovery?</h2>
        <p>Book your post-operative care plan today. Available nationwide via telehealth. No referral required.</p>
        <button class="cta-button" onclick="window.location.href='/'; setTimeout(() => { showPage('schedule') }, 100);">Schedule Your Post-Op Care →</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>

  <footer>
    <div class="container">

      <p><a href="/">Home</a> | <a href="/">Contact</a> | <a href="/">Pricing</a></p>

FILE: ./send-confirmation.js

const { Resend } = require('resend');

module.exports = async function handler(req, res) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return res.status(405).json({ error: 'Method not allowed' });
  }

  try {
    const resend = new Resend(process.env.RESEND_API_KEY);
    const { email, fname, lname, service, procedure, date, time, feedbackConsent } = req.body;

    if (!email) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No email provided' });

    const patientName = `${fname || ''} ${lname || ''}`.trim() || 'Patient';
    const serviceList = Array.isArray(service) ? service.join(', ') : (service || 'Consultation');

    // Send patient confirmation
    await resend.emails.send({
      from: 'OpWell Concierge <onboarding@resend.dev>',
      to: email,
      subject: 'Your OpWell Concierge Booking is Confirmed',
      html: `
        <div style="font-family: Georgia, serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; color: #2c2c2c;">
          <div style="background: #3b2a1a; padding: 32px 40px; text-align: center;">
            <h1 style="color: #e8c97a; font-size: 1.6rem; margin: 0; letter-spacing: 0.05em;">OpWell Concierge™</h1>
            <p style="color: rgba(232,201,122,0.75); margin: 6px 0 0; font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.08em;">ANESTHESIOLOGIST-LED TELEHEALTH</p>
          </div>

          <div style="background: #fdf8f4; padding: 40px;">
            <h2 style="color: #3b2a1a; font-size: 1.3rem; margin-top: 0;">Your Booking is Confirmed</h2>
            <p style="color: #555; line-height: 1.7;">Dear ${patientName},</p>
            <p style="color: #555; line-height: 1.7;">Thank you for booking with OpWell Concierge. Your payment has been received and your appointment is confirmed.</p>

            <div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e8d9c8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 24px; margin: 24px 0;">
              <h3 style="color: #3b2a1a; margin-top: 0; font-size: 1rem;">Booking Summary</h3>
              <p style="margin: 6px 0; color: #555;"><strong>Service:</strong> ${serviceList}</p>
              ${procedure ? `<p style="margin: 6px 0; color: #555;"><strong>Procedure Type:</strong> ${procedure}</p>` : ''}
              ${date ? `<p style="margin: 6px 0; color: #555;"><strong>Preferred Date:</strong> ${date}</p>` : ''}
              ${time ? `<p style="margin: 6px 0; color: #555;"><strong>Preferred Time:</strong> ${time}</p>` : ''}
            </div>

            <h3 style="color: #3b2a1a; font-size: 1rem;">What Happens Next</h3>
            <ol style="color: #555; line-height: 2;">
              <li>You will receive a separate email from <strong>Charm Health</strong> with your patient portal login to complete your intake forms.</li>
              <li>Your telehealth appointment link will be sent to this email before your consultation.</li>
              <li>If you have any questions before your appointment, reply to this email or call us at <strong>(678) 235-5822</strong>.</li>
            </ol>

            <p style="color: #555; line-height: 1.7;">We look forward to supporting you on your surgical journey.</p>
            <p style="color: #555; line-height: 1.7;">Warmly,<br><strong>Dr. Ornella Oluwole</strong><br>OpWell Concierge™</p>
          </div>

          <div style="background: #3b2a1a; padding: 20px 40px; text-align: center;">
            <p style="color: rgba(232,201,122,0.6); font-size: 0.8rem; margin: 0;">OpWell Concierge™ · Telehealth · GA, OH & VA · (678) 235-5822</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      `,
    });

    // Send doctor notification
    await resend.emails.send({
      from: 'OpWell Bookings <onboarding@resend.dev>',
      to: 'dr.oluwole@opwellconcierge.com',
      subject: `New Booking: ${patientName} — ${serviceList}`,
      html: `
        <div style="font-family: Arial, sans-serif; max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; color: #2c2c2c;">
          <div style="background: #3b2a1a; padding: 24px 32px;">
            <h2 style="color: #e8c97a; margin: 0; font-size: 1.2rem;">New Patient Booking — OpWell Concierge</h2>
          </div>
          <div style="padding: 32px; background: #fdf8f4;">
            <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.95rem;">
              <tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888; width:140px;">Patient</td><td style="padding:8px 0; font-weight:600;">${patientName}</td></tr>
              <tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Email</td><td style="padding:8px 0;"><a href="mailto:${email}">${email}</a></td></tr>
              <tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Service</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${serviceList}</td></tr>
              ${procedure ? `<tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Procedure</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${procedure}</td></tr>` : ''}
              ${date ? `<tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Preferred Date</td><td style="padding:8px 0; font-weight:600; color:#b85c2b;">${date}</td></tr>` : ''}
              ${time ? `<tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Preferred Time</td><td style="padding:8px 0; font-weight:600; color:#b85c2b;">${time}</td></tr>` : ''}
              <tr><td style="padding:8px 0; color:#888;">Feedback Consent</td><td style="padding:8px 0;">${feedbackConsent ? 'Yes ✓' : 'No'}</td></tr>
            </table>
            <div style="margin-top:24px; padding:16px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #e8d9c8; border-radius:8px;">
              <p style="margin:0; font-size:0.9rem; color:#555;">Reply to this email or contact the patient directly to confirm their preferred time slot.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      `,
    });

    return res.status(200).json({ success: true });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error('Email error:', err);
    return res.status(500).json({ error: err.message });
  }
};

        <div class="opt-desc">Cesarean delivery &amp; recovery</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="cancer" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#127895;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">Cancer</div>
        <div class="opt-desc">Tumor removal, staging, biopsy</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="notsure" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">?</div>
        <div class="opt-label">Not Sure / Show All</div>
        <div class="opt-desc">Comprehensive view, all surgery types</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Step 2: Timeline -->
  <div class="intake-step" data-step="2">
    <h3>When is your surgery?</h3>
    <p class="intake-sub">This helps us prioritize what you need to focus on first.</p>
    <div class="intake-options three-col">
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="<1week" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#9888;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">Less than 1 week</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="1-2weeks" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#128197;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">1&ndash;2 weeks</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="2-4weeks" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#128197;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">2&ndash;4 weeks</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="4+weeks" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#128197;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">More than 4 weeks</div>
      </div>
      <div class="intake-opt" data-value="postop" onclick="pickIntake(this)">
        <div class="opt-icon">&#9989;</div>
        <div class="opt-label">Already had surgery</div>
        <div class="opt-desc">I need recovery info</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Step 3: Health Conditions (multi-select) -->
  <div class="intake-step" data-step="3">
    <h3>Do you have any of these conditions?</h3>
    <p class="intake-sub">Select all that apply. This helps us highlight important safety information for you.</p>
    <div class="intake-options four-col">
      <div class="intake-opt multi" data-value="diabetes" onclick="pickMulti(this)">

      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Step 4: Smoking -->

    <div class="intake-options three-col">

  <!-- Step 6: Anxiety -->

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!-- MODULE 1: MEDICATION & SUPPLEMENT REVIEW          -->
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="module-card" data-module="1">
  <div class="module-header" onclick="toggleModule(1)">
    <div class="module-number">1</div>
    <div class="module-header-text">
      <h3>Medication &amp; Supplement Review</h3>
      <div class="module-tag">What to stop, what to keep, and when</div>
    </div>
    <div class="module-chevron">&#9662;</div>
  </div>
  <div class="module-body">

    <p>One of the most important steps you can take before surgery is reviewing every medication, supplement, and vitamin you take with your surgical team. Some common over-the-counter products can increase bleeding, interfere with anesthesia, or interact with post-surgical medications. This module walks you through exactly what to look for.</p>

    <div class="dr-tip">
      <p>I always tell my patients: bring every single bottle &mdash; prescription, supplement, vitamin, herbal tea &mdash; to your pre-op appointment. You'd be surprised how many "harmless" supplements can cause serious bleeding during surgery.</p>
    </div>

    <h4>Blood Thinners &amp; NSAIDs</h4>
    <p>These medications affect how your blood clots. Your surgeon and anesthesiologist will give you specific stop dates, but here are general guidelines:</p>

    <table class="data-table">
      <tr><th>Medication</th><th>Typical Stop Time</th><th>Notes</th></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Aspirin</strong> (low-dose 81mg)</td><td>7 days before</td><td>Unless cardiologist says continue</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Ibuprofen</strong> (Advil, Motrin)</td><td>7 days before</td><td>Switch to Tylenol for pain</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Naproxen</strong> (Aleve)</td><td>7&ndash;14 days before</td><td>Longer-acting NSAID &mdash; discuss with your surgeon</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Eliquis</strong> (apixaban)</td><td>2&ndash;3 days before</td><td>Per prescribing physician</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Xarelto</strong> (rivaroxaban)</td><td>2&ndash;3 days before</td><td>Per prescribing physician</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Warfarin</strong> (Coumadin)</td><td>5 days before</td><td>May need bridging therapy</td></tr>
      <tr><td><strong>Plavix</strong> (clopidogrel)</td><td>5&ndash;7 days before</td><td>Do NOT stop without cardiologist approval</td></tr>
    </table>

    <div class="warning-box">
      <div class="warning-title">Important</div>
      <p>Never stop a blood thinner on your own. Always confirm with the prescribing physician &mdash; especially if you have a heart stent, atrial fibrillation, or history of blood clots.</p>
    </div>

    <h4>GLP-1 Medications (Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro)</h4>
    <p>If you take a GLP-1 receptor agonist for weight loss or diabetes, this is critically important. These medications slow gastric emptying, which means food can remain in your stomach much longer than normal. This creates a real aspiration risk (food or liquid entering your lungs) under anesthesia.</p>

    <p><strong>Current ASA (American Society of Anesthesiologists) guidance:</strong></p>
    <ul>
      <li><strong>Weekly injections</strong> (semaglutide/Ozempic, Wegovy): Skip the dose due in the <strong>week before</strong> surgery (effectively a 7-day hold)</li>
      <li><strong>Daily injections</strong> (liraglutide/Saxenda): Hold the <strong>day of surgery</strong></li>
      <li><strong>Tirzepatide</strong> (Mounjaro/Zepbound): Hold for <strong>7 days</strong> before surgery</li>
      <li>If GI symptoms (nausea, vomiting, bloating) are present, consider a <strong>longer hold</strong> and discuss with your anesthesiologist</li>
      <li>Your anesthesiologist may recommend a <strong>gastric ultrasound</strong> on the day of surgery to check for residual stomach contents</li>
    </ul>

    <div class="warning-box">
      <div class="warning-title">Forgot to Hold Your GLP-1?</div>
      <p>If you forgot to hold your GLP-1 medication, tell your anesthesiologist immediately. Surgery may still proceed if you have no GI symptoms, but your team needs to know so they can take extra precautions.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="dr-tip">
      <p>I am seeing more and more patients on GLP-1 medications. If you're on one, please don't feel embarrassed to tell us &mdash; we just need to know so we can keep you safe. A full stomach under anesthesia is one of the most dangerous situations we face.</p>
    </div>

    <h4>Supplements &amp; Herbals to Stop</h4>
    <p>The general rule: <strong>stop all supplements and herbal products at least 7&ndash;14 days before surgery</strong> unless your doctor tells you otherwise.</p>

    <table class="data-table">
      <tr><th>Supplement</th><th>Why Stop?</th><th>Stop Timing</th></tr>
      <tr><td>Fish oil / Omega-3</td><td>Increases bleeding</td><td>7&ndash;14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Vitamin E (high dose)</td><td>Increases bleeding</td><td>7&ndash;14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Garlic supplements</td><td>Increases bleeding</td><td>7 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Ginkgo biloba</td><td>Increases bleeding</td><td>7 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Ginseng</td><td>Affects blood sugar &amp; bleeding</td><td>7 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Turmeric / Curcumin</td><td>Blood-thinning properties</td><td>7&ndash;14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>St. John's Wort</td><td>Drug interactions with anesthesia</td><td>14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Kava</td><td>Liver toxicity, sedation interaction</td><td>14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Valerian root</td><td>Sedation interaction</td><td>14 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Echinacea</td><td>Immune &amp; liver concerns</td><td>7 days</td></tr>
      <tr><td>Green tea extract (capsules)</td><td>Bleeding risk at high doses</td><td>7 days</td></tr>
    </table>

    <h4>Medications to Keep Taking</h4>
    <p>Most chronic medications should be continued. Common ones to <strong>keep taking</strong> (with a small sip of water on surgery morning):</p>
    <ul>
      <li><strong>Blood pressure medications</strong> &mdash; usually continue (except ACE inhibitors and ARBs &mdash; ask your surgeon)</li>
      <li><strong>Heart medications</strong> (beta blockers, statins) &mdash; continue</li>
      <li><strong>Thyroid medication</strong> &mdash; continue</li>
      <li><strong>Anti-seizure medications</strong> &mdash; continue</li>
      <li><strong>Asthma inhalers</strong> &mdash; continue (bring to hospital)</li>
      <li><strong>Antidepressants / Anti-anxiety</strong> &mdash; usually continue (discuss MAOIs (a type of older antidepressant, such as phenelzine or tranylcypromine) specifically)</li>
    </ul>

    <div class="info-box">
      <div class="info-title">What About Metformin?</div>
      <p>Metformin for diabetes is usually held the morning of surgery and for 48 hours after, especially if you're receiving IV contrast dye. Your surgeon will confirm.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Cosmetic specialty -->
    <div data-surgery="cosmetic">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">Cosmetic Surgery Note</div>
        <p><strong>Blood clot risk:</strong> Cosmetic procedures &mdash; especially abdominoplasty (tummy tuck), BBL, and combined procedures &mdash; carry an elevated risk for blood clots in the legs (DVT) or lungs (PE). Your surgeon may recommend:</p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Stop birth control pills or HRT</strong> 4&ndash;6 weeks before surgery (estrogen increases clot risk)</li>
          <li>Blood clot prevention with compression stockings and/or low-dose blood thinners post-op</li>
          <li>Early and frequent walking after surgery</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Bariatric specialty -->
    <div data-surgery="bariatric">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">Bariatric Surgery Note</div>
        <p><strong>Vitamin deficiency screening:</strong> Before bariatric surgery, your surgeon should order labs to check for existing deficiencies &mdash; because after surgery, absorption changes make these even harder to correct. Key labs include:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Vitamin D (25-hydroxy)</li>
          <li>Vitamin B12</li>
          <li>Iron panel (ferritin, TIBC &mdash; total iron-binding capacity)</li>
          <li>Thiamin (vitamin B1)</li>
          <li>Folate</li>
          <li>Calcium</li>
          <li>Zinc</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="margin-top:10px;">If any are low, your surgeon will correct them <em>before</em> surgery. This is especially important because post-op, your ability to absorb these nutrients will be permanently reduced.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Gynecologic specialty -->
    <div data-surgery="gynecologic">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">Gynecologic Surgery Note</div>
        <p><strong>Hormonal medications:</strong> Discuss all hormonal medications with your surgeon:</p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Birth control pills (combined oral contraceptives):</strong> Slightly increase blood clot risk, but stopping before surgery is NOT routinely recommended. Blood clot prevention measures will be used.</li>
          <li><strong>Hormone replacement therapy (HRT):</strong> Discuss with your surgeon &mdash; may or may not need to be paused depending on your risk factors</li>
          <li><strong>GnRH agonists (Lupron):</strong> If you&rsquo;re on these for fibroids or endometriosis, your surgeon will guide timing</li>
        </ul>
        <p style="margin-top:10px;"><strong>UTI screening:</strong> Urinary tract infections should be treated <em>before</em> surgery. If you have symptoms (burning, frequency, urgency), tell your surgical team right away.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Cesarean specialty -->
    <div data-surgery="cesarean">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">C-Section Note</div>
        <p><strong>Prenatal vitamins:</strong> Continue your prenatal vitamins through delivery and postpartum, especially if breastfeeding. Additionally:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Review your blood pressure medications with your OB team</li>
          <li>If on blood thinners (e.g., for blood clotting disorders), your OB will plan the timing carefully around delivery</li>
          <li>Anti-nausea medication can be given with your spinal/epidural to prevent nausea during surgery</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Cancer specialty -->
    <div data-surgery="cancer">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">Cancer Surgery Note</div>
        <p><strong>Chemotherapy &amp; medications:</strong> If you&rsquo;re receiving or have recently completed chemotherapy, your surgical and medical oncology teams will coordinate timing carefully:</p>
        <ul>
          <li>Some chemo drugs affect blood clotting, immune function, or wound healing</li>
          <li>Bring a complete list of all cancer medications, including targeted therapies and immunotherapies</li>
          <li>Blood thinners may need careful coordination around surgery</li>
          <li>Your blood counts will be checked before surgery to ensure safe levels</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Chronic Disease Guidance (shown in print, condition-filtered in interactive) -->
    <div data-condition="risk-diabetes">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">If You Have Diabetes</div>
        <p><strong>Key medication guidance for diabetic patients:</strong></p>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Metformin:</strong> Hold the day of surgery. Restart when eating normally.</li>
          <li><strong>SGLT2 inhibitors</strong> (Jardiance, Farxiga, Invokana): <strong>Stop 3&ndash;4 days before surgery</strong> &mdash; risk of diabetic ketoacidosis under anesthesia.</li>
          <li><strong>Insulin:</strong> Your doctor will adjust your dose &mdash; do NOT take your full morning dose while fasting. Typically take 50&ndash;80% of long-acting insulin the night before.</li>
          <li><strong>Sulfonylureas</strong> (glipizide, glyburide): Hold the morning of surgery (risk of low blood sugar).</li>
          <li><strong>A1C goal:</strong> Below 8% before elective surgery (ideally below 7%).</li>
          <li><strong>Recovery:</strong> Check blood sugar every 4&ndash;6 hours. Target 140&ndash;180 mg/dL. Report readings above 250. Watch wounds closely &mdash; high blood sugar slows healing.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div data-condition="risk-heart">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">If You Have Heart Disease</div>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Beta-blockers</strong> (metoprolol, carvedilol): <strong>Continue</strong> &mdash; do NOT stop suddenly. Take with a sip of water morning of surgery.</li>
          <li><strong>Statins</strong> (atorvastatin, rosuvastatin): <strong>Continue</strong> through surgery.</li>
          <li><strong>ACE inhibitors</strong> (-pril meds) and <strong>ARBs</strong> (-sartan meds): Often held the morning of surgery.</li>
          <li><strong>Diuretics:</strong> Often held morning of surgery to prevent dehydration.</li>
          <li><strong>If you have a coronary stent:</strong> Bare metal stent: wait 30+ days for elective surgery. Drug-eluting stent: wait 3&ndash;12 months. NEVER stop antiplatelet medications without your cardiologist&rsquo;s approval.</li>
          <li>Bring your pacemaker/defibrillator card if applicable. Bring recent cardiac test results (EKG, echo, stress test).</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div data-condition="risk-clots">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">If You Take Blood Thinners</div>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Warfarin:</strong> Stop 5 days before. INR checked before surgery. May need bridging with injectable blood thinner.</li>
          <li><strong>Eliquis/Xarelto/Edoxaban:</strong> Stop 2&ndash;3 days before (high bleeding risk) or 1&ndash;2 days (low risk).</li>
          <li><strong>Plavix:</strong> Stop 5 days. <strong>Brilinta:</strong> Stop 5 days. <strong>Effient:</strong> Stop 7 days.</li>
          <li><strong>Aspirin:</strong> Often continued &mdash; discuss with your surgeon.</li>
          <li>NEVER stop blood thinners without instructions from both your prescribing doctor AND your surgeon.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div data-condition="risk-lung">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">If You Have Lung Disease</div>
        <ul>
          <li>Practice incentive spirometer 10 times every hour while awake &mdash; start NOW, not after surgery.</li>
          <li><strong>Bring all inhalers</strong> to the hospital. Use your rescue inhaler morning of surgery if instructed.</li>
          <li>If on inhaled steroids, continue through surgery.</li>
          <li>Walking and breathing exercises for 4+ weeks before surgery significantly reduces lung complications.</li>
          <li>After surgery: deep breathing every 1&ndash;2 hours, sit upright, walk early and often, cough and clear secretions.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div data-condition="risk-osa">
      <div class="specialty-note">
        <div class="specialty-label">If You Have Sleep Apnea</div>
        <ul>
          <li><strong>Bring your CPAP/BiPAP machine</strong>, mask, headgear, and power cord to the hospital.</li>
          <li>Share your pressure settings and bring sleep study results if available.</li>
          <li>Continue using CPAP every night leading up to surgery.</li>
          <li>After surgery: you will use CPAP in recovery. Opioid doses will be carefully managed.</li>
          <li>Avoid sleeping flat on your back &mdash; keep head of bed elevated.</li>
        </ul>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Checklist -->
    <div class="checklist">
      <div class="checklist-title">&#9745; Medication Review Checklist</div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Made a list of ALL medications, supplements, vitamins, and herbals I take</div>
      </div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Confirmed blood thinner stop date with prescribing doctor</div>
      </div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Informed surgeon about GLP-1 medication (if applicable)</div>
      </div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Stopped all supplements and herbals 7&ndash;14 days before surgery</div>
      </div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Know which medications to take morning of surgery with a small sip of water</div>
      </div>
      <div class="checklist-item" onclick="toggleCheck(this)">
        <div class="check-box"></div>
        <div class="check-text">Brought medication list to pre-op appointment</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="knowledge-check" data-quiz="1">
      <h4 class="quiz-title">Quick Knowledge Check</h4>
      <div class="quiz-question" data-q="1">
        <p class="quiz-prompt">When should you typically stop herbal supplements before surgery?</p>
        <div class="quiz-options">
          <button class="quiz-opt" data-answer="a" onclick="handleQuiz(this)">The morning of surgery</button>
          <button class="quiz-opt" data-answer="b" data-correct onclick="handleQuiz(this)">7&ndash;14 days before surgery</button>
          <button class="quiz-opt" data-answer="c" onclick="handleQuiz(this)">Only if your surgeon specifically mentions them</button>
        </div>
        <div class="quiz-feedback"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="quiz-question" data-q="2">
