  // Q8 — Anesthesia consultation
  { q: "Have you ever had a real conversation with an anesthesiologist about YOUR surgery?",
    sub: "Not the 5 minutes before a previous procedure — an actual sit-down discussion.",
    opts: [
      {t:"Yes — a thorough conversation", ds:0, flag:null},
      {t:"Briefly, right before a previous surgery", ds:1, flag:null},
      {t:"Never", ds:2, flag:"No prior anesthesiologist consultation"},
    ]
  },
];

var answers = [];
var current = 0;
var N = QS.length;

function render() {
  var c = document.getElementById('quiz-container');
  c.innerHTML = '';
  QS.forEach(function(q, i) {
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'question-card' + (i===0?' active':'');
    card.id = 'q'+i;
    var oh = q.opts.map(function(o,j){
      return '<div class="option" onclick="pick('+i+','+j+')" id="o'+i+'_'+j+'"><div class="option-dot"></div><span>'+o.t+'</span></div>';
    }).join('');
    card.innerHTML = '<div class="q-num">Question '+(i+1)+' of '+N+'</div>'+
      '<h2>'+q.q+'</h2>'+
      (q.sub?'<p style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#888;margin:-0.75rem 0 1rem;font-style:italic;">'+q.sub+'</p>':'')+
      '<div class="options">'+oh+'</div>'+
      '<div class="nav-row">'+(i>0?'<button class="btn-back" onclick="back('+i+')">← Back</button>':'<span></span>')+
      '<button class="btn-next" id="nx'+i+'" onclick="next('+i+')">'+(i===N-1?'Get My Score →':'Next →')+'</button></div>';
    c.appendChild(card);
  });
}

function pick(qi,oi){
  answers[qi]=oi;
  document.querySelectorAll('#q'+qi+' .option').forEach(function(o){o.classList.remove('selected')});
  document.getElementById('o'+qi+'_'+oi).classList.add('selected');
  document.getElementById('nx'+qi).classList.add('enabled');
}

function next(qi){
  if(answers[qi]===undefined)return;
  document.getElementById('q'+qi).classList.remove('active');
  if(qi<N-1){current=qi+1;document.getElementById('q'+current).classList.add('active');document.getElementById('progress').style.width=((current+1)/N*100)+'%';}
  else{showResults();}
}

function back(qi){
  document.getElementById('q'+qi).classList.remove('active');
  current=qi-1;document.getElementById('q'+current).classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('progress').style.width=((current+1)/N*100)+'%';
}

function showResults(){
  document.getElementById('progress').style.width='100%';
  document.getElementById('quiz-container').style.display='none';

  var disease=1, surgery=1, anxiety=1, flags=[], isMedTourism=false;

  QS.forEach(function(q,i){
    var o=q.opts[answers[i]];
    if(o.ds) disease=Math.max(disease, o.ds);
    if(o.ss) surgery=Math.max(surgery, o.ss);
    if(o.as) anxiety=Math.max(anxiety, o.as);
    if(o.mt) isMedTourism=true;
    if(o.flag) flags.push({text:o.flag, severity: (o.ds>=3||o.ss>=3||o.as>=3)?'red':(o.ds>=2||o.ss>=2||o.as>=2)?'orange':'green'});
  });

  // Decision algorithm
  var level = 'green';
  if(disease>=3 || surgery>=3 || (disease>=2 && surgery>=2) || (anxiety>=3 && (disease>=2||surgery>=2))){
    level='red';
  } else if(anxiety>=3 || (anxiety>=2 && (disease>=2||surgery>=2))){
    level='yellow';
  }

  // Score for display (inverse — lower = more risk)
  var rawScore = (3-disease)+(3-surgery)+(3-anxiety);
  var pct = Math.round(rawScore/6*100);

  var circle=document.getElementById('score-circle');
  var scoreTxt=document.getElementById('score-txt');
  var titleEl=document.getElementById('result-title');
  var descEl=document.getElementById('result-desc');
  var ctaEl=document.getElementById('cta-card');

  if(level==='red'){
    circle.className='score-circle score-red';
    scoreTxt.textContent='HIGHER RISK';
    titleEl.textContent='We Strongly Recommend a Pre-Surgery Consultation';
    descEl.textContent='Your answers indicate factors that should be reviewed by a physician before your procedure. A 50-minute telehealth consultation with a board-certified anesthesiologist can help you go into surgery safer and more confident.';
    ctaEl.innerHTML='<h3>Don\'t go into surgery without preparation.</h3><p>Dr. Oluwole reviews your complete health picture — medications, risk factors, and mental readiness — and builds a plan specifically for you.</p><a class="cta-btn" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/schedule">Book Your Consultation →</a>';
  } else if(level==='yellow'){
    circle.className='score-circle score-yellow';
    scoreTxt.textContent='MODERATE RISK';
    titleEl.textContent='Some Areas Need Attention Before Surgery';
    descEl.textContent='You have a few factors that could benefit from professional review. Addressing them before your procedure can make a real difference in your outcome and peace of mind.';
    ctaEl.innerHTML='<h3>A consultation could make a real difference.</h3><p>50 minutes with a board-certified anesthesiologist who reviews your medications, addresses your concerns, and helps you feel genuinely ready.</p><a class="cta-btn" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/schedule">Book Your Consultation →</a>';
  } else {
    circle.className='score-circle score-green';
    scoreTxt.textContent='LOOKING GOOD';
    titleEl.textContent='You\'re Medically Ready — But Surgery Is Only Half the Journey';
    descEl.textContent='Your pre-surgery readiness looks solid. But most patients say recovery is the hardest part — and that\'s where having a physician in your corner matters most.';
    if(isMedTourism){
      ctaEl.innerHTML='<h3>Traveling abroad for surgery?</h3><p>Your health looks good, but surgery abroad comes with unique risks — blood clots on flights, medication timing, and having no doctor to call when you\'re home. OpWell is your safety net.</p><a class="cta-btn" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/medical-tourism">Medical Tourism Program →</a>';
    } else {
      ctaEl.innerHTML='<h3>Make sure nothing is missed.</h3><p>Even when your readiness looks good, many patients have questions about medications, anesthesia, or recovery that never get answered. OpWell is here for every part of your journey.</p><a class="cta-btn" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/schedule">Book a Pre-Surgery Consultation →</a><br><a class="cta-btn secondary" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/recovery">Explore Post-Op Recovery →</a><br><a class="cta-btn secondary" href="https://www.opwellconcierge.com/mental-health">Mental Wellness Support →</a>';
    }
  }

  // Render risk factors
  var rl=document.getElementById('risk-list');
  rl.innerHTML='';
  if(flags.length===0){
    rl.innerHTML='<div class="risk-item"><div class="risk-dot green"></div>No significant risk factors identified</div>';
  } else {
    flags.forEach(function(f){
      rl.innerHTML+='<div class="risk-item"><div class="risk-dot '+f.severity+'"></div>'+f.text+'</div>';
    });
  }

  // Hide risk factors section if green with no flags
  if(level==='green' && flags.length<=1) document.getElementById('risk-factors-wrap').style.display='none';

  document.getElementById('results').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('promo-welcome').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('email-capture').style.display='block';

  // Track quiz completion with Google Analytics
  if(typeof gtag !== 'undefined'){
    gtag('event', 'quiz_complete', {
      'quiz_name': 'Surgery Readiness',
      'risk_level': level,
      'score': pct
    });
  }

  // Animate score number
  var scoreEl=document.getElementById('score-num');
  var startT=0;
  function anim(ts){
    if(!startT)startT=ts;
    var p=Math.min((ts-startT)/1500,1);
    var e=1-Math.pow(1-p,3);
    scoreEl.textContent=Math.floor(e*pct);
    if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(anim);
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(anim);
}

function captureEmail(){
  var email=document.getElementById('capture-email').value.trim();
  var status=document.getElementById('email-status');
  if(!email){status.textContent='Please enter your email.';return;}
  status.textContent='Sending...';
  fetch('/api/abandoned-cart',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({action:'capture',email:email,fname:'',lname:'',service:'Surgery Readiness Quiz'})})
  .then(function(){status.textContent='Sent! Check your inbox.';status.style.color='#2e7d32';})
  .catch(function(){status.textContent='Sent! Check your inbox.';status.style.color='#2e7d32';});
}

render();
</script>

</body>
</html>

FILE: ./test-buttons.js

// Quick smoke test for critical button functionality
// Run: node test-buttons.js

const fs = require('fs');

const html = fs.readFileSync('index.html', 'utf8');

const tests = [
  {
    name: 'Hero "Book Your Consultation" button',
    pattern: /<a[^>]*onclick="showPage\('schedule'\)"[^>]*>Book Your Consultation/,
    critical: true
  },
  {
    name: 'Sticky mobile CTA button',
    pattern: /<button[^>]*onclick="showPage\('schedule'\)"[^>]*>Book Now/,
    critical: true
  },
  {
    name: 'All onclick handlers valid',
    pattern: /onclick="(?:showPage|mobileNavTo|window\.location|toggleMobileNav|dismissExitPopup)\(/g,
    critical: true
  },
  {
    name: 'No missing showPage function calls',
    pattern: /onclick="showPage\('[^']+'\)"/,
    critical: true
  },
  {
    name: 'Meta tags present',
    pattern: /<meta name="description"/,
    critical: true
  }
];

console.log('\n🧪 Running smoke tests...\n');

let passed = 0;
let failed = 0;

tests.forEach(test => {
  const result = test.pattern.test(html);
  const status = result ? '✅' : '❌';
  const critical = test.critical ? '[CRITICAL]' : '';

  console.log(`${status} ${test.name} ${critical}`);

  if (result) passed++;
  else {
    failed++;
    if (test.critical) {
      console.log(`   → ${test.name} not found!`);
    }
  }
});

console.log(`\n${passed} passed, ${failed} failed\n`);

if (failed > 0) {
  process.exit(1);
}
